title: A GLIMPSE of the 99%: a census of the faintest galaxies during the epoch reionization and its implications for galaxy formation models
toc_summary: Deep census of faint reionization-era galaxies
background_knowledge:
在宇宙早期，中性氢的再电离（reionization）过程标志着宇宙从“黑暗时代”步入黎明。理论认为，首批星系和大质量黑洞产生的紫外光子是再电离的主要能源。
星系紫外光度函数（UV Luminosity Function，UVLF）描绘了不同紫外绝对星等（M_UV）对应的星系数密度，是研究早期星系形成与演化、量化电离光子产额的核心观测手段。UVLF 的亮端主要由稀少的亮星系主导，而暗端（faint-end）斜率（通常以参数 α 描述）则反映了低质量星系的数目多寡。
早期的哈勃望远镜（HST）观测受限于灵敏度和波段，通常只能测量到 M_UV ≈ -17 等以上，暗端斜率存在较大误差，并且是否截断（turnover）一直是困扰理论模型的难题。一些模型预言，由于反馈效应（如超新星爆发、电离辐射压等）会抑制小质量暗晕（dark matter halo）中的气体冷却和恒星形成，因而在某一较亮星等（如 M_UV ≈ -15）处 UVLF 会出现截断。
JWST 凭借其极高的红外灵敏度和分辨率，结合引力透镜的天然放大效应，首次能够系统探测到 M_UV ≈ -12 甚至更暗的星系，真正触及了形成再电离光子主体的“隐带”星系，为检验这些模型提供了前所未有的观测窗口。
contribution:
本文基于 JWST 的 GLIMPSE 巡天数据，利用强引力透镜放大效应，构建了 z = 6–9 星系紫外光度函数，探测深度达到 M_UV = -12 等，比此前可信约束深了约 3 个星等。
主要发现包括：
- 在 z ~ 7 处，UVLF 的暗端斜率 α = -1.98±0.06，表现出极其陡峭的上升趋势，直到最暗端（M_UV = -12.3）仍未见截断迹象。
- 这一持续陡升的暗端星系族群对预言 UVLF 会因辐射反馈或恒星形成阈值而早期趋于平坦的星系形成模型和宇宙学模拟构成了严格挑战。
- 近年为匹配 z>10 处 JWST 发现的紫外亮端超出而特调的模型，普遍无法同时拟合较低红移（z~7）和更暗星等的观测，表明当前对早期星系并合过程的认知存在显著内在矛盾。
- 基于测得的 UVLF，计算得到 z=7 时的共动电离光子辐射率约为 log(n_ion / s⁻¹ Mpc⁻³) ≈ 50.85，该数值意味着即便星系际介质（Intergalactic Medium，IGM）的团块化因子高达 C_HII = 5，暗端星系产生的光子仍足以维持宇宙再电离。
- 由于暗端截面无截断，本文实质上排除了 UVLF 在 M_UV ≥ -15 处发生截断的可能性；这要求未来研究要么精确刻画 z>6 全局低质量星系的电离性质（如逃逸分数），要么改进 IGM 团块化及其红移演化的物理模型，以保持与再电离时间线的自洽。
summary: We present a comprehensive study of the galaxy UV luminosity function (UVLF) at $z=6-9$ leveraging deep JWST observations from the GLIMPSE survey. Thanks to gravitational lensing, we probe the UVLF to an unprecedented depth of $M_{\text{UV}} = -12$ mag, approximately three magnitudes deeper than previous robust constraints. Our UVLF determination incorporates a rigorous end-to-end uncertainty framework, including statistical and systematic lensing uncertainties. We find that the $z \sim 7$ UVLF continues to rise steeply with a faint-end slope of $α= -1.98_{-0.05}^{+0.06}$. Crucially, our data show no clear evidence of a turnover down to \muv $= -12.3$. The persistence of this faint population provides stringent constraints on galaxy formation models and cosmological simulations that predict an early flattening of the luminosity function due to radiative feedback or star-formation thresholds. Furthermore, post-JWST models specifically calibrated to match the UV-bright excess at $z > 10$ generally fail to reproduce the observed evolution toward lower redshifts and fainter magnitudes, highlighting a significant tension in our current understanding of early galaxy assembly. We derive a comoving ionizing emissivity at $z=7$ of log($n_{\mathrm ion}$ / s$^{-1}$ Mpc$^{-3}$) $\approx 50.85$, which suggests that faint galaxies dominate the ionizing budget, providing enough photons to maintain reionization even in a highly clumped IGM ($C_{\text{HII}} = 5$). As our detection of faint galaxies effectively rules out a luminosity function truncation at $M_{\text{UV}} \geq -15$, these results emphasize the need to either accurately characterize the ionizing properties of the global, low-mass galaxy population at $z > 6$, or to refine physical models of intergalactic medium clumping and its redshift evolution to maintain consistency with the observed reionization timeline.

title: Supermassive stars with embedded stellar black hole cores: dense assembling star clusters as faint multiple Little Red Dot systems
toc_summary: Embedded black holes in supermassive stars as faint Little Red Dots
background_knowledge:
在高红移宇宙中，第一代恒星与星团的形成环境极为致密。根据数值模拟，当星团密度达到类似 JWST 发现的原球状星团水平（面密度 Σ ≳ 10^6 M⊙ pc⁻²）时，频繁的动力学碰撞可能导致恒星并合，形成质量超过 1000 倍太阳质量的极超大质量星（EMS）甚至超过 10000 倍太阳质量的超巨星（SMS）。这类“失控并合”过程是宇宙早期形成中等质量黑洞（IMBH）的重要候选渠道。

在理论天体物理中，还存在一类特殊天体——“准星”（quasi-star），它是由一个中心黑洞嵌在巨型气体包层内构成的。如果超大质量恒星的核心在塌缩成黑洞后仍能维持外围包层，黑洞便可通过吸积包层物质快速生长，而整个系统在观测上可能表现为一种黯淡的红色致密源。这样的模型对于理解超大质量黑洞的种子形成以及引力波源的前身天体具有重要意义。

近期，JWST 在红移 z > 4 的宇宙中探测到一类被称为“小红点”（Little Red Dots, LRDs）的神秘天体。它们具有极红的颜色和致密的形态，传统上被解释为带有尘埃遮蔽的活动星系核，然而观测到的多源性和较暗的亮度对标准活动星系核模型提出了挑战，促使人们探索其他解释，例如星团中包裹着黑洞的超大质量恒星系统。
contribution:
本文利用包含后牛顿黑洞动力学与恒星演化的直接 N 体模拟，研究了正在组装的高密度星团。研究发现，在面密度极高的环境中（Σ ≳ 10^6 M⊙ pc⁻²），星团内大质量恒星通过碰撞形成极超大质量星甚至超巨星的过程中，恒星质量黑洞（m ≲ 60 M⊙）会因快速的质量分层和动力学弛豫效应，被拖入超大质量星的引力影响范围，并最终嵌入其气体包层，形成类似“准星”的结构。

这一嵌入式黑洞阶段（准星阶段）的持续时间比超巨星本身的寿命长数个量级，使得黑洞可以通过持续的恒星碰撞来增长质量。若系统捕获了多个恒星黑洞，还可能形成嵌入式的引力波源。模拟显示，这类星团组装区的尺度（约 100 pc）、准星质量（≳ 10^4 M⊙）以及它们与年轻大质量蓝色恒星形成团块的紧密空间关联，与 JWST 近期发现的暗弱多核“小红点”的观测特征高度吻合。因此，本研究指出，在最高密度的星团中，通过失控并合形成超大质量星并自然演化出嵌入式黑洞，可能是解释这类神秘天体的一条重要途径。
summary: Numerical simulations have established that star clusters with densities comparable to the high redshift ($z>6$-$10$) James Webb Space Telescope (JWST) proto globular clusters may build up extremely massive (EMSs; $m_\mathrm{\star}>1000 M_\odot$) or even supermassive stars (SMSs; $m_\mathrm{\star}>10000 M_\odot$) and potentially intermediate mass black holes (IMBHs) through runaway stellar collisions. Using direct simulations of assembling star clusters including post-Newtonian black hole dynamics and stellar evolution, we demonstrate that in such dense environments ($Σ_\mathrm{h} \gtrsim 10^6 M_\odot$pc$^\mathrm{-2}$) stellar BHs ($m_\bullet \lesssim 60 M_\odot$), driven by rapid mass segregation and relaxation effects within the sphere of influence of the EMSs/SMSs, may strongly interact with the extremely massive stars and become embedded within their gaseous layers. We suggest that this quasi-star (QS) like embedded BH phase is a natural outcome of the runaway formation of EMSs/SMSs in the densest star clusters. The QS phase is orders of magnitude longer in duration than the lifetime of the SMS, enabling an extended growth period by stellar collisions, and allows the formation of embedded gravitational wave sources if the QS captures more than a single stellar BH. The star cluster assembly region sizes ($\sim100$ pc), QS masses ($\gtrsim 10^4 M_\odot$) and their proximity to young, massive blue star forming clumps are consistent with the faint population of multiple little red dots (LRDs) recently discovered by the JWST.

title: Cluster-green galaxy correlations: where do these galaxies live?
toc_summary: Green valley galaxies in cluster outskirts
background_knowledge: 星系的形成与演化是现代天体物理学的核心问题之一。在颜色-星等图（color-magnitude diagram）上，星系呈现出明显的双峰分布：蓝色的恒星形成星系（star-forming galaxies）和红色的宁静星系（quiescent galaxies），两者之间存在一个过渡区域，被称为“绿谷”（Green Valley）。绿谷星系被认为正处于从活跃的恒星形成向宁静状态转变的阶段，因此是研究星系熄灭（quenching）机制的理想探针。星系熄灭可以受到多种内部和外部过程的影响，其中环境效应尤为关键。高密度环境（如星系团中心、大质量暗晕内部）会通过冲压剥离（ram-pressure stripping）、潮汐作用、或饥饿（strangulation）等方式剥夺星系的气体，抑制恒星形成，促使星系向红端演化。相反，低密度场环境中的星系往往拥有持续的气体供给，保持蓝色。为了量化星系性质与环境的关系，研究者常用大尺度结构（large-scale structure）分析方法，例如交叉相关函数（cross-correlation function），来测量不同类型星系相对于星系团、群或暗物质晕的空间分布。近年来，大规模光谱巡天（如斯隆数字巡天SDSS）与高分辨率宇宙学流体力学模拟（如IllustrisTNG）的结合，使得人们能够从统计上细致探索绿谷星系的生存环境，从而加深对星系演化后期阶段的理解。
contribution: 本文利用IllustrisTNG-300流体力学模拟与SDSS观测数据，通过星系团-星系交叉相关函数系统研究了绿谷星系的空间分布。在TNG模拟中，绿谷星系相对于星系团（以M200 ≥ 10^13.5 M⊙定义中心）的比例随团心距增加而上升，在团外围区域达到峰值，这一趋势在低质量星系和低质量暗晕中尤为显著，部分尺度上绿谷比例甚至超过红色星系。SDSS数据呈现出定性相似的趋势，但绿谷比例在所有尺度上均低于红色星系。为了理解这一差异，作者基于TNG构建了与SDSS选择函数匹配的模拟星表，发现其可以重现观测信号，表明投影效应是导致模拟与观测之间差异的主要原因。研究结论指出，绿谷星系作为中央暗晕的卫星星系，优先分布于星系系统的外围，支持它们是在环境熄灭主导下正处于过渡阶段的星系这一物理图景。
summary: Green valley (GV) galaxies are thought to represent a transitional population between star-forming and quiescent systems. However, their spatial distribution relative to galaxy systems remains unclear, particularly in relation to the large-scale environmental influence on galaxy quenching. We aim to determine whether GV galaxies preferentially inhabit specific environments within galaxy systems. We analyse the spatial distribution of GV galaxies using the cluster-galaxy cross-correlation function (CCF), based on the hydrodynamical simulation Illustris TNG300-1 (TNG) and observational data from the Sloan Digital Sky Survey (SDSS). Galaxy systems with $\log(M_{200}/M_{\odot}) \geq 13.5$ are used as cluster centres, while galaxies classified as blue, green, or red serve as tracers for the correlation analysis. In TNG, GV galaxies show an increasing relative fraction with cluster-centric distance, peaking in the outskirts, particularly for low-mass galaxies and haloes, and in some cases the GV fraction exceeds that of red galaxies. SDSS data reveal qualitatively similar trends, with the GV fraction remaining below that of red galaxies at all scales. Mock catalogues built from TNG and matched to SDSS selection functions reproduce the observational signal, indicating that projection effects drive the differences between datasets. GV galaxies preferentially reside in the outskirts of galaxy systems as satellites bound to the central halo, supporting a scenario in which they are transitioning objects influenced by environmental quenching.

title: The lifetime of 100,000 molecular clouds in the nearby Universe
toc_summary: Lifetimes of giant molecular clouds
background_knowledge: 分子云是星系中恒星形成的摇篮，尤其巨分子云（GMC）作为最大的恒星形成单元，其诞生、演化与瓦解过程直接调控着星系的恒星形成率。当前领域内存在两大主流云团形成机制：一是自引力主导的自由落体塌缩，二是大质量恒星反馈（如星风、超新星爆发）驱动的激波压缩。近年来，随着 JWST 等设备提供的高分辨率多波段观测，研究者得以在近邻星系中系统性地分解单个 GMC，并探讨星系环境（如分子气体面密度、恒星形成活动、星系结构）如何影响云团的物理性质。一个关键科学问题是云团的实际寿命：若远长于自由落体时标，意味着存在额外支撑机制（如磁场、湍流）；若与自由落体时标相当，则表明引力塌缩占主导。此外，云团形成时标的测量对理解星系尺度的气体耗散与恒星形成效率至关重要。
contribution: 本文利用 PHANGS-JWST 巡天在 66 个近邻星系中辨识出的约 10 万个 GMC 样本（统一分辨率 30 pc），系统测量了不同星系环境下的云团质量谱（幂律斜率在 -1.2 至 -2.0 之间）。作者基于多重反馈压缩模型估算了每个云团的形成时间，发现质量 ≤10⁵ M⊙ 的云团平均形成时标约 20 Myr，而更大质量云团（约 10⁶–10⁷ M⊙）的形成可长达 100 Myr。云团形成在星系中心区域明显更快，比星系盘区域短约 5–10 Myr，尤其在恒星形成活动增强的中心分子带表现突出，揭示了强烈大质量星形成、高分子气体面密度及强超声速压缩对云团形成的加速作用。然而恒星形成整体效率低下：云团寿命仅为分子气体耗散时标的约 1%。云团形成时间比自由落体时标长约 0.1 dex，暗示磁场、恒星反馈或其他机制延缓了直接塌缩，表明大质量 GMC 具有较长寿命。此外，在旋涡星系和盘星系中，GMC 年龄随星系中心距离的变化有限，提示云团形成在这些星系类型中遵循相似的过程。
summary: Multiple mechanisms are proposed for the formation of giant molecular clouds (GMCs), from gravitational free-fall caused by self-gravity to stellar feedback-driven gas compression. Both the galactic environment and galaxy conditions could play an additional role in enhancing the formation via their gas surface density and star formation activity. In this paper, we make use of a catalog of 108,466 GMCs identified by F770W PHANGS--JWST imaging across 66 galaxies at a homogenized resolution of 30~pc. We measure the mass spectra in various galactic regions, whose power-law slopes vary from $-1.2$ to $-2.0$. We then estimate the formation time of each cloud using a model where GMCs form from multiple feedback compression, and find that clouds with masses $\leq 10^{5}\,M_{\odot}$ form, on average, in 20~Myr, with more massive clouds ($\sim 10^{6}$--$10^{7}\,M_{\odot}$) taking up to 100~Myr. We also find that cloud formation proceeds most rapidly in the central regions of galaxies, with formation timescales that are typically shorter by $\sim 5$--$10$~Myr compared to galactic disks. This effect is most pronounced in central molecular zones with enhanced star formation, highlighting the role of intense massive star formation, high molecular gas surface densities, and strong supersonic compressions in accelerating cloud formation. However, star formation is generally inefficient as the cloud lifetime is $\sim 1\,\%$ of the molecular depletion time. The formation time of clouds is $\sim 0.1$~dex longer than the free-fall time. This hints that magnetic fields, stellar feedback, or other mechanisms may prolong their formation instead of immediate free-fall collapse. This indicates a longevity of massive GMCs. The GMC ages also show only limited variation with galactocentric radius in both spiral and disk galaxies, suggesting that cloud formation proceeds similarly in these galaxy types.

title: The functional form of galaxy and halo luminosity and mass functions
toc_summary: Symbolic regression for galaxy and halo mass functions
background_knowledge: 在天体物理与宇宙学中，星系光度函数（Luminosity Function, LF）、恒星星系质量函数（Stellar Mass Function, SMF）以及暗物质晕质量函数（Halo Mass Function, HMF）是描述宇宙中各类天体族群统计分布的核心观测量。LF 给出单位体积内不同光度星系的数密度，SMF 则反映星系在不同恒星质量区间内的数目分布，二者直接刻画了星系形成与演化的总体效率与历史。HMF 描述的是暗物质晕在不同质量下的丰度，是连接宇宙早期密度扰动与后期结构形成的桥梁，也是预测星系占据暗晕模型（HOD）的关键输入。长期以来，人们使用简单的解析函数来拟合这些分布，例如 LF 和 SMF 常用 Schechter 函数（由低质量端的幂律与高质量端的指数截断组成）或其双成分扩展，而 HMF 则多采用 Press-Schechter 理论及其改进形式（如 Sheth-Tormen、Tinker 等）。然而，这些函数形式往往基于经验选择或简化的物理假设，可能并非对现有高精度观测数据的最优描述，尤其在外推至未被观测覆盖的区间时可能引入偏差。因此，从数据本身出发、以自动化且系统的方式探索更优的函数形式，成为提升统计推断可靠性和物理洞察的重要方向。符号回归（Symbolic Regression）作为一种可解释的机器学习方法，可在给定的数学运算符集合中搜索最优解析表达式，兼顾拟合精度与模型复杂度，为这一课题提供了新颖的解决思路。
contribution: 本文运用详尽符号回归（Exhaustive Symbolic Regression, ESR）算法，自动搜索星系光度函数、恒星质量函数和暗物质晕质量函数的最优拟合函数形式。ESR 在用户定义的运算符基础集内，对所有满足一定复杂度上限的函数进行穷举扫描，并以“描述长度”（Description Length，近似贝叶斯证据）作为评分指标，平衡拟合准确度与函数简洁性。研究发现，在 LF 和 SMF 方面，大量新发现的函数形式在描述长度上显著优于传统的单/双 Schechter 函数；在 HMF 方面，同样找到了超越 Press-Schechter 及 Warren/Tinker 等标准形式的表达式。通过进一步施加“物理性检查”——即要求函数在数据范围外具有合理的 extrapolation 行为以及在整个质量范围内积分收敛等——研究筛选出兼具高精度、低复杂度和良好外推特性的最优函数形式。这些函数不仅可作为现有文献中拟合函数的直接替代方案，作者还构建了一个可扩展的通用框架，展示如何将符号回归用于任何天体物理数据集的最优函数形式自动发现。
summary: The galaxy luminosity and stellar mass function (LF, SMF), and halo mass function (HMF), are fundamental quantities in astrophysics and crucial inputs to a range of astrophysical and cosmological analyses. They are typically parametrised by fitting functions that have been chosen "by eye" to match observed or simulated data. We apply symbolic regression -- specifically the Exhaustive Symbolic Regression (ESR) algorithm -- to automate the search for optimal LF, SMF and HMF functional forms. ESR scores all functions up to a maximum complexity composed of a user-defined basis set of operators using the description length, an approximation to the Bayesian evidence that balances accuracy with complexity. We find many functions outperforming the Schechter and double Schechter functions for the LF and SMF, and that outperform the Press--Schechter and Warren/Tinker functions for the HMF. By additionally imposing "physicality checks" on functions' extrapolation and integration properties, we identify the optimal, low-complexity functional forms in terms of accuracy, simplicity and behaviour beyond the data range. As well as providing drop-in replacements for literature LF, SMF and HMF fitting functions, and identifying robust behaviour across well-fitting functions, we present a framework with which symbolic regression may be used to automate the discovery of optimal functions for any astrophysical dataset.

title: A graph-based Neural Network surrogate model for accelerating semi-analytical model of galaxy formation and evolution
toc_summary: Graph neural network accelerates SAM predictions
background_knowledge: 在标准宇宙学模型中，宇宙结构的形成是等级式的：暗物质晕通过并合逐渐成长，而星系则在这些晕的中心形成和演化。半解析模型（Semi-Analytic Model，简称 SAM）是一种广泛使用的理论框架，它利用暗物质晕的并合树，结合一系列简化的解析公式来描述重子物理过程（如气体冷却、恒星形成、反馈等），从而预测星系的多种物理性质。与完全的流体动力学模拟相比，SAM 的计算效率很高，但为了探索庞大的参数空间并约束星系形成理论，仍需要运行成千上万次模型实例，这对计算资源提出了挑战。近年来，机器学习特别是图神经网络（Graph Neural Network，简称 GNN）的兴起为加速此类模型提供了新途径：GNN 天然适合处理并合树这种图结构数据，可以通过学习 SAM 的输入（并合树与参数）到输出（星系性质）的映射，构建一个高精度代理模型，从而在推理阶段几乎瞬时地给出预测，极大加速参数探索和模型校准过程。
contribution: 本文开发了一个条件图神经网络（conditional GNN）代理模型，将暗物质晕并合树的信息与半解析模型参数相结合，用于预测星系在整个宇宙时间内的性质。该模型使用来自 Uchuu 大尺度结构模拟的暗物质晕并合树，以及 Galacticus 半解析模型产生的数据作为训练集，能够同时预测恒星质量、光度、角动量、气体金属丰度以及特定恒星形成率，覆盖从 z=0 到 z=5 的宽广红移范围。对于恒星质量，模型在 z=0-3 范围内的预测散度仅为 0.19-0.28 dex，决定系数 R² 达到了 0.946-0.973。结果表明，单个图神经网络模型能够跨越不同的 SAM 参数实现、并合树和红移，以良好的准确度再现这些星系性质。这一量表级（catalog-level）模型为加速基于 SAM 的星系形成研究、从而更精细地探究模型参数空间提供了一条实用途径。相关推理代码、训练模型和示例数据已公开发布在 GitHub 上。
summary: Understanding how galaxy populations emerge and evolve from the growth of dark matter structure is a central challenge in galaxy formation theory. Semi-analytic models (SAMs) provide an efficient framework to address this problem, but exploring large ensembles of merger trees across broad parameter spaces remains computationally demanding. We develop a conditional graph neural network surrogate model that combines merger tree information with SAM parameters to predict galaxy properties across cosmic time. Using merger trees of dark matter halos from the Uchuu simulation and the Galacticus SAM, the model predicts stellar mass, luminosity, angular momentum, gas metal mass, and specific star formation rate across the wide redshift range of 0 <= z <= 5. For instance, the model can predict stellar mass at 0 <= z <= 3 with a scatter of 0.19-0.28 dex and coefficient of determination R^2 of 0.946-0.973 (R^2 close to 1 indicates prediction closely matching the truth). The results show that a single graph based model can reproduce these galaxy properties with good accuracy over multiple SAM realizations, merger trees and redshifts. This catalog-level model provides a practical route for accelerating SAM based studies of galaxy formation to enable a more detailed investigation of the model parameter space. The inference code, trained models, and example data products are publicly available at https://github.com/MutongCat/sam2galaxy-gnn.

title: The Dependence of the Mean Spectral Energy Distributions on the Accretion Rate for Quasars with $z < 0.75$ from the Sloan Digital Sky Survey
toc_summary: Quasar SEDs versus accretion rate
background_knowledge: 活动星系核（AGN）的能谱能量分布（SED）是揭示中心超大质量黑洞吸积物理和周围环境的关键观测量。类星体作为高光度的 1 型 AGN，其连续谱从紫外到中红外覆盖了吸积盘、宽线区以及尘埃环的热辐射和非热辐射。由于观测视角和吸积状态的差异，类星体的 SED 呈现出显著的多样性。主成分分析发现，类星体光谱的主要方差可用“本征向量 1”（Eigenvector 1）来描述，其核心参数包括光学 Fe II 相对强度（R_FeII）和 Hβ 宽线宽度（FWHM_Hβ），它们分别与爱丁顿比率和黑洞质量等物理量存在经验关联。研究 SED 如何随这些参数以及吸积率变化，有助于厘清 AGN 统一模型中的几何效应与物理机制，并改进宇宙学距离测量中对类星体标准烛光的利用。
contribution:
本研究基于斯隆数字化巡天（SDSS）DR16 中 56,969 个红移 z < 0.75 的类星体多波段数据（从中红外到紫外），构建了依赖于本征向量 1 参数（R_FeII 和 FWHM_Hβ）的平均 SED，并直接按爱丁顿比率（或无量纲吸积率）进行分档。主要发现包括：
- 随着 R_FeII 增大（即相对 Fe II 发射增强），平均 SED 的紫外、光学以及中红外-近红外连续谱整体变红，表明尘埃辐射贡献增加。
- 直接按爱丁顿比率分档时，中红外、近红外和紫外连续谱随吸积率升高而变红，但光学连续谱呈现相反趋势（变得更蓝、更硬），暗示光学发射区的复杂性。
- 按 Hβ 线宽分档显示，较宽的 Hβ（即较大 FWHM_Hβ）对应光学和近红外连续谱变红，而紫外和中红外连续谱变蓝；中红外变蓝可能反映了视线方向与尘埃环平面的夹角增大，导致环的中红外辐射减弱。
这些结果表明，1 型 AGN 的 SED 形状显著依赖于吸积率，并且不同波段对吸积率和几何效应的响应存在差异。
summary: We construct mean spectral energy distributions (SEDs) for a substantial sample of 56,969 Sloan Digital Sky Survey DR16 quasars with $z < 0.75$, utilizing multiwavelength data from the mid-infrared (MIR) to ultraviolet (UV). These SEDs are built on eigenvector 1 parameters -- the relative optical $\rm Fe~ II$ strength ($R_{\rm Fe~II}$) and the H$β$ line width ($\rm Hβ$) -- that capture the principal spectral variance of quasar spectra. From three $R_{\rm Fe~II}$-dependent mean SEDs we find that quasars with a larger $R_{\rm Fe~II}$ exhibit redder UV and optical and redder MIR and near-infrared (NIR) continua, indicating more dust emission. We also split our sample directly into Eddington ratio $L_{\rm Bol} /L_{\rm Edd}$ (or dimensionless accretion rate $\dot{\mathscr{M}}$) bins to construct different mean SEDs and find that the continua become increasingly red with increasing $L_{\rm Bol} /L_{\rm Edd}$ (or $\dot{\mathscr{M}}$) in the MIR, NIR, and UV bands. This demonstrates that the shapes of Type 1 AGN SEDs depend on the accretion rate. However, the optical continuum shows the opposite trend (becoming harder and bluer), indicating the complexity of the optical emission region. From $\rm FWHM_{Hβ}$-dependent mean SEDs we find that quasars with a larger $\rm FWHM_{Hβ}$ show redder optical and NIR continua and bluer UV and MIR continua. The bluer MIR continuum suggests that a larger angle between of the line of sight and the torus plane results in weaker torus emission in the MIR.

title: Analysis of a Septuple Open Cluster System and Its Extended Family in Gaia DR3
toc_summary: Septuple Open Cluster System Analysis
background_knowledge: 疏散星团（Open Cluster）是由数十至数千颗恒星组成的相对松散的恒星集团，它们在引力束缚下共同运动，通常诞生于同一个巨型分子云（Giant Molecular Cloud）中。在银河系内，疏散星团是研究恒星形成、演化以及银河系结构与动力学的重要探针。近年来，随着 Gaia 卫星释放高精度天体测量数据，天文学家得以更准确地筛选星团成员、追踪它们的空间运动，并揭示一些罕见的“星团复合体”或“星团家族”——即多个疏散星团在空间和运动学上紧密关联，暗示它们可能具有共同的起源。这类多重星团系统（Multiple Cluster System）的发现和确认，为理解星团如何在母分子云中成团形成、以及后期如何受银河系潮汐场作用而缓慢瓦解，提供了天然的实验场所。通过分析成员星的自行、视向速度和化学丰度，可以回溯星团的轨道演化，进而约束其动力学年龄和母云性质。当前，Gaia DR3 数据结合先进的聚类算法和统计建模，正不断刷新我们对星团群体和银河系局部结构的认知。
contribution: 本文利用 Gaia DR3 的天体测量和测光数据，对一个罕见的七合疏散星团系统（Septuple Open Cluster System）及其扩展成员进行了深入分析。研究首先采用层次聚类（Agglomerative Hierarchical Clustering）和 Bayesian-HDBSCAN 算法，识别出一个由七个已知疏散星团和两个新增成分（含一个新候选体）组成的致密核心，总成员数达到九个，构成了一个星团关联（Association）。随后，通过组合高斯混合模型（GUMM）、贝叶斯核密度估计（Bayesian-KDE）和贝叶斯 XDGMM 方法进行统计建模，精细推算了成员概率，并成功探测到潮汐尾（Tidal Tails）结构。反向轨道积分（Backward Orbital Integrations）显示，该系统中的成员在过去 2000 至 3000 万年间具有高度一致的运动学特征，强烈支持它们起源于同一片大质量分子云。这一多重星团系统为研究星团的多重性、动力学演化以及银河系结构提供了一个难得的宇宙实验室。
summary: A rare multiple open cluster system has been analyzed using Gaia DR3 astrometry and photometry data. Using Agglomerative Hierarchical clustering and Bayesian-HDBSCAN, we identify a compact core consisting of seven known open clusters and two additional components, including a new candidate, forming a nine-member association. Membership probabilities are refined through statistical modeling, combining GUMM, Bayesian-KDE, and Bayesian-XDGMM for tidal tails identification. Backward orbital integrations confirm coherent motions over 20-30 million years, suggesting a common origin from the same massive molecular cloud. This system offers a unique laboratory for investigating cluster multiplicity, dynamical evolution, and Galactic structure.

title: Itô tracers: continuous-trajectory Lagrangian particles for Eulerian hydrodynamics
toc_summary: Itô tracers: continuous Lagrangian particles
background_knowledge: 在天体物理流体动力学模拟中，示踪粒子（tracer particles）是追踪气体演化历史、金属丰度分布和恒星形成等过程的重要工具。传统的欧拉网格方法本身难以直接记录气体微元（gas parcels）的拉格朗日历史，因此通常引入无质量的测试粒子，使其跟随流场运动。经典拉格朗日示踪粒子以局部格心速度（cell-centered velocity）平流，但该方法无法体现数值扩散，导致系统性偏差，尤其是在激波、湍流混合和多相介质等复杂区域。为修正这一问题，蒙特卡洛（Monte-Carlo）示踪粒子方法被提出，它基于网格面通量进行概率跳跃，从而在统计上再现扩散效应；然而，其轨迹在时间上不连续，给后续分析和物理耦合带来不便。近年来，随着星系形成、星际介质（ISM）和宇宙学模拟对亚网格物理及高精度示踪的需求日益增长，发展兼具连续轨迹时间演化、扩散一致性和计算灵活性的新型示踪方法成为重要方向。Itô 示踪粒子正是基于随机微分方程（SDE）框架，将平流、扩散和色散统一纳入连续轨迹描述，从而提供了更普适和可扩展的解决方案。
contribution: 本文提出了一种新型的连续轨迹拉格朗日示踪粒子方法——Itô 示踪粒子（Itô tracers），其核心思想是通过随机微分方程，使粒子的低阶矩在统计意义上与气体的平流、数值扩散和色散精确匹配，从而克服传统方法中轨迹与气体特性不一致的问题。此外，作者还引入了亚网格尺度变体（SGS-Itô），将数值扩散替换为基于 Smagorinsky-Lilly 模型的湍流扩散率，表明扩散的具体形式对结果影响较小，而扩散量的幅值更为关键。通过一维方波平流测试和三维衰减湍流（速度弥散为 15 倍声速）的数值验证，系统比较了经典示踪、蒙特卡洛示踪和 Itô 示踪的表现。统计测试显示，Itô 示踪在柱密度图、联合密度直方图、对数密度比概率分布函数（PDF）和密度功率谱等指标上，普遍达到甚至优于蒙特卡洛示踪的水平。在湍流测试中，Itô 示踪将粒子与气体密度之间的相关性相对于蒙特卡洛示踪提高了超过 3%，将对数密度比 PDF 的宽度缩小了接近 50%；而相比于经典示踪，这些改进幅度分别达到约 30% 和 230%。由于 Itô 示踪基于随机微分方程，该方法可以自然地推广到其他连续轨迹的拉格朗日过程（如尘埃颗粒动力学、带电粒子输运、宇宙线传播），并支持方差缩减技术、高阶积分器以及 GPU 友好实现，这些优势在离散跳跃方案中均难以获得。
summary: Lagrangian tracer particles have long been used to track the history of individual gas parcels in hydrodynamical codes. Particles advected by the cell-centered velocity carry no representation of underlying numerical diffusion, and thus exhibit systematic bias. The Monte-Carlo (MC) tracer resolves this with discrete probabilistic cell-to-cell, flux-based jumps, at the cost of trajectories that are discontinuous in time. We introduce the Itô tracer, a continuous-time Lagrangian particle with moments matched to the advection, diffusion, and dispersion of the gas. A subgrid-scale variant (SGS-Itô) replaces the numerical diffusion with a Smagorinsky--Lilly turbulent diffusivity, illustrating that the form of the diffusion matters less than its magnitude. We validate these methods with a 1D square-pulse advection test and 3D decaying turbulence at $σ_{\rm rms} = 15\,c_{\rm s}$. We compare the different tracer particle methods using several statistical tests. Itô tracers largely reproduce or improve upon MC tracers statistics across column-density maps, joint density histograms, log-density-ratio PDFs, and density power spectra. In the turbulence test, Itô tracers improve the correlation between tracers and gas over the MC tracers by >3\%, and reduce the width of the log-density ratio PDF by nearly 50\%. Relative to classical tracers, these improvements are $\gtrsim$30\% and 230\%, respectively. Because Itô tracers follow a stochastic differential equation, the method maps onto other continuous-trajectory Lagrangian processes (e.g. dust grains, charged particles, cosmic rays), admits variance-reduction techniques, higher-order integrators, and GPU-friendly implementations -- all of which are unavailable to discrete-jump schemes.

title: The Three Hundred project: cosmic web identification from 2D gas and Compton-$y$ maps of galaxy clusters outskirts
toc_summary: Cosmic web identification in cluster outskirts
background_knowledge: 宇宙网（cosmic web）是宇宙大尺度结构的基本形态，由暗物质和重子物质在引力作用下形成网络状分布，包含纤维（filament）、节点（node）和空洞（void）。星系团位于纤维的交汇节点，其外围环境中的弥散气体和暗物质细丝对于理解结构形成、星系演化及重子物质循环至关重要。传统上，研究者通过星系分布来示踪宇宙网，但这仅反映暗物质晕的分布。随着观测技术进步，利用热气体的 SZ（Sunyaev-Zel'dovich）效应——即宇宙微波背景光子与热电子发生逆康普顿散射产生的光谱畸变——可以直接探测温热点（warm-hot intergalactic medium, WHIM）的辐射信号，为重建纤维结构提供了新的窗口。然而，实际观测数据为二维投影，从二维 Compton-$y$ 参数图或 X 射线表面亮度图中提取三维纤维网络存在投影混淆和信号丢失等问题。因此，评估基于二维观测重建宇宙网的可靠性，并比较不同示踪剂（如气体密度与 SZ 信号）的差异，成为该领域的重要课题。常见的骨架提取算法如 DisPerSE，利用 Morse 理论或持久同调技术，能够从离散数据中识别拓扑结构，已被广泛应用于宇宙纤维的识别。
contribution:
本研究基于“The Three Hundred”模拟项目中的星系团样本，系统评估了利用二维气体分布和模拟的 Compton-$y$ 图重建宇宙纤维网络的可靠性。主要工作与发现包括：
- 使用 DisPerSE 算法从星系团外围区域的二维气体分布图中提取纤维网络，并与沿视线方向投影的三维网络进行对比，以纯度和完整性量化二维网络的表现。
- 发现二维骨架能很好地复现底层三维结构的关键点和纤维，骨架脊线之间中值距离约为 0.22 $h^{-1}$ Mpc，但二维网络的连接度略有低估。
- 同样从红移 $z=0$ 的模拟 Compton-$y$ 图中识别纤维网络，与二维气体网络比较，两者具有良好空间一致性，骨架中值距离约为 0.24 $h^{-1}$ Mpc。
- 进一步分析表明，星系团外围的气体优先分布于纤维结构中，这些纤维贡献了外围积分 Compton-$Y$ 参数约 80% 的份额，凸显了纤维环境对星系团外温热气体储存的重要作用。
summary: Galaxy clusters are located at the nodes of the filamentary network known as the cosmic web. A more comprehensive understanding of galaxy clusters can be achieved by considering their environment, in particular, the filamentary structures to which they are connected. In this work, we aim to assess the reliability of the cosmic web reconstruction from mock observational data. In particular, we aim to quantify the effects of the 2D projection relative to the underlying 3D network and the impact of using the Sunyaev-Zel'dovich (SZ) effect as a tracer of the cosmic web. We reconstruct the filamentary networks in the outskirts of The Three Hundred simulated clusters with the filament finder DisPerSE. First, we extract the networks from the 2D gas distribution and evaluate their purity and completeness with respect to the 3D networks projected along the line of sight. We also compute the distances between the corresponding skeletons. Moreover, we identify filaments from simulated Compton-$y$ maps of the clusters at redshift $z=0$, and we compare them with the 2D gas network. The skeletons extracted from 2D maps provide good representations of the underlying 3D ones, both in terms of critical points and filaments. We find a median distance between the spines of the 2D and projected 3D networks of approximately $0.22 \, h^{-1}$ Mpc, although the connectivity derived from the 2D networks is slightly underestimated. We observe a good spatial agreement between the gas and SZ networks, with a median distance of $\approx 0.24 \, h^{-1}$ Mpc. Finally, we show that gas outside galaxy clusters is preferentially located in filamentary structures, which contribute $\sim 80\%$ of the integrated Compton-$Y$ parameter of clusters' outskirts.

title: Accurate distances of the Galactic spiral arms from dust-scattered X-ray emission of gamma-ray bursts
toc_summary: Precise spiral arm distances from X-ray dust rings
background_knowledge: 银河系旋臂结构的精确描绘是天体测量学的重要目标之一。传统的距离测量主要依赖恒星视差、造父变星周光关系或分子云运动学方法，但这些方法在远距离上存在较大不确定性。利用 X 射线尘埃散射环（X-ray dust scattering ring）提供了一种独立的几何测距手段：当河外 X 射线瞬变源（如伽马射线暴 GRB 或 X 射线双星爆发）的强烈辐射穿过银河系星际介质时，会被其中的尘埃颗粒散射。由于不同散射角度的光子路径长度不同，观测者会看到以源为中心、随半径时间演化的晕环。环的角半径 θ 与尘埃云距离 D 之间满足简单几何关系：θ ≈ (2ct/D)^{1/2}，其中 c 为光速，t 为延迟时间。通过精确测量环的扩展速率，即可直接获得尘埃云的距离，精度可达百分之几，且几乎不依赖银河系模型假设。这一方法自 20 世纪 70 年代起便被用于研究星际尘埃分布，近年来随着 XMM-Newton 和 Chandra 等 X 射线望远镜的高角分辨率和灵敏度提升，使得探测更远、更暗的环成为可能，为描绘银河系旋臂的真实三维图景提供了强有力的新工具。
contribution: 本研究系统分析了三个低银河纬度伽马射线暴 GRB 031203（l~255°，b~-5°）、GRB 160623A（l~84°，b~-3°）和 GRB 221009A（l~53°，b~4°）的全部可用 XMM-Newton 和 Chandra 后随观测。先前在这些观测中已识别出由 5 kpc 以远的尘埃云产生的 X 射线散射环，并初步将其与英仙臂（Perseus Arm）、外臂（Outer Arm）及外矩尺-半人马臂（Outer Scutum-Centaurus Arm）中的尘埃结构关联。本研究在此基础上，于 GRB 160623A 方向新发现两个环，对应距离为 6.91±0.06 kpc 和 9.9±0.6 kpc 的尘埃云；并通过第二期 XMM-Newton 观测独立确认了 GRB 031203 方向一个位于 9.7±0.4 kpc 的尘埃云存在。尤为突出的是，借助对 GRB 221009A 的一次 Chandra 和四次 XMM-Newton 观测，成功将距离测量延伸至 19.0±0.2 kpc。这些测量具有很小的统计误差和系统误差，为银河系外部区域的几何结构提供了严格约束，并揭示出与当前主要依赖光谱学旋转曲线模型的距离预言之间存在显著偏差。
summary: The details of the spiral structure of the Milky Way are still debated due to large uncertainties in the distance estimates obtained through the most common tracers. X-ray dust scattering rings produced by short extragalactic X-ray transients provide instead a direct method to measure the 3D distribution of interstellar clouds up to the edges of our Galaxy with a few percent precision. We report on the analysis of all the available XMM-Newton and Chandra follow-up observations of three low-latitude gamma-ray bursts: GRB 031203 ($l \sim 255°$, $b \sim -5°$), GRB 160623A ($l \sim 84°$, $b \sim -3°$), and GRB 221009A ($l \sim 53°$, $b \sim 4°$). The previous detection of X-ray rings in these observations, produced by dust clouds located beyond 5 kpc, can be associated with dust in the Perseus, Outer, and Outer Scutum-Centaurus arms, thus providing direct distance measurements to these structures along three distinct lines of sight. We have identified two additional rings in the direction of GRB 160623A, produced by dusty clouds at $6.91\, \pm\,0.06$ kpc and $9.9\,\pm\,0.6$ kpc, and confirmed -- through a second XMM-Newton observation -- the presence of one cloud at $9.7\,\pm\,0.4$ kpc toward GRB 031203. We also accurately measured the distance of dusty clouds up to $19.0\,\pm\,0.2$ kpc owing to the analysis of one Chandra and four XMM-Newton observations of GRB 221009A. The small statistical and systematic uncertainties of these measurements place tight constraints on the geometry of the outer Milky Way and reveal significant deviations from current models, which critically depend on spectroscopy-based Galactic rotation curves at large distances.

title: A systematic evaluation of vision-language models for observational astronomical reasoning tasks
toc_summary: Evaluating vision-language models in astronomy
background_knowledge: 在当代天文学研究中，海量的多模态观测数据——包括光学图像、射电干涉图、多波段测光数据、时域光变曲线和光谱——对自动化分析与理解提出了迫切需求。近年来，大型视觉-语言模型（Vision-Language Models, VLMs）作为通用型的科学数据解释工具迅速兴起，它们能够同时处理视觉输入和自然语言，为跨越不同数据类型的智能推理带来希望。然而，天文学数据具有高度的专业性和物理内涵：图像中的星系形态、光谱中的谱线特征、光变曲线中的暂现事件等，都需要紧密结合天体物理背景知识才能正确解读。因此，一个核心挑战在于如何评估这些通用模型在真实天文观测上的可靠性，以及它们是否能够真正“理解”而不仅仅是“看起来像”正确判断。目前，该领域仍缺乏系统性的基准测试来诊断VLMs在不同天文模态下的表现瓶颈，这限制了将前沿AI技术安全、有效地融入天文研究流程的进程。
contribution: 该研究构建了首个多模态天文视觉-语言模型评估基准 AstroVLBench，涵盖光学成像、射电干涉、多波段测光、时域光变曲线和光学光谱五类任务，包含超过 4100 个经专家验证的实例。在六个前沿模型的评测中发现：(1) 模型表现高度依赖数据模态，Gemini 3 Pro 整体最为均衡，但各模型在不同任务上各有优劣，且所有模型均显著落后于领域专用方法。(2) 通过机制消融实验揭示，性能不仅取决于将注意力指向显著视觉特征，更依赖于将这些特征根植于物理知识中。其中，描述“看什么”的现象学提示通过聚焦模型注意力可提升准确率，而解释“为何重要”的物理提示整体表现更优，并能减少类别间的偏见。(3) 将一维测量数据直接以数值表格而非渲染图表呈现时，准确率最高可提升 13 个百分点。(4) 推理质量分析表明，缺乏显式物理根植时，模型可能依据表面现象学线索给出正确答案，但其物理论证却并不精确，说明仅凭准确率不足以确保科研部署的可信性。这些发现为 VLMs 在观测天文学中的应用建立了首个系统性多模态基线，并明确指出了当前模型在表征、根植和推理方面的具体瓶颈。
summary: Vision-language models (VLMs) are increasingly proposed as general-purpose tools for scientific data interpretation, yet their reliability on real astronomical observations across diverse modalities remains untested. We present AstroVLBench, a comprehensive benchmark comprising over 4,100 expert-verified instances across five tasks spanning optical imaging, radio interferometry, multi-wavelength photometry, time-domain light curves, and optical spectroscopy. Evaluating six frontier models, we find that performance is strongly modality-dependent: while one model (Gemini 3 Pro) emerges as the most consistently capable across tasks, task-specific strengths vary, and all models substantially underperform domain-specialized methods. Mechanistic ablations reveal that performance depends not only on directing attention to salient visual features but also on grounding those features in physical knowledge. Phenomenological prompts describing what to look for improve accuracy by sharpening model focus, but physical prompts explaining why those features matter perform better overall and yield more balanced classifications with reduced class-specific bias. Consistent with this picture, presenting the underlying one-dimensional measurements directly as numerical tables instead of rendered plots yields up to 13 percentage points improvement. Reasoning quality analysis further demonstrates that, without explicit physical grounding, models may reach correct predictions from phenomenologically plausible cues while providing physically imprecise justifications, establishing that accuracy alone is insufficient for trustworthy scientific deployment. These findings provide the first systematic, multi-modal baselines for VLMs in observational astronomy and identify the specific representation, grounding, and reasoning bottlenecks where current models fail.

title: East Asian VLBI Network astrometry toward the star-forming region G040.96+02.48 in the Extreme Outer Galaxy
toc_summary: EAVN astrometry toward far-side star-forming region
background_knowledge: 在天体物理学中，精确测量银河系内天体的距离和运动（天体测量）是理解银河系整体结构、动力学和演化的基础。由于太阳系位于银河系盘面内，加之星际尘埃的严重消光，光学波段的天体测量难以穿透银盘，尤其是对于银河系远侧（far side）的天体。射电波段不受尘埃影响，而甚长基线干涉测量（VLBI）技术能够提供毫角秒量级的高分辨率，使得利用分子脉泽（如22 GHz水脉泽）作为点源进行三角视差和自行测量成为可能。通过测量脉泽的视差，可以直接得到其距离，而自行则反映了天体在三维空间中的运动。结合银河系旋转模型，可以进一步研究旋臂的位置、外盘的翘曲（warp）以及暗物质晕对银河系动力学的影响。近年来，随着东亚VLBI网络（EAVN）、甚长基线阵列（VLBA）等设施的长期监测，科学家逐渐积累了银河系内大量脉泽的天体测量数据，但远侧天体的样本仍然非常稀少。精确测量这些遥远星形成区的距离和运动，对于约束银河系远端旋臂的形态、建立盘翘曲模型以及研究星系形成与演化至关重要。
contribution:
本工作利用东亚VLBI网络（EAVN）对位于银河系远侧的星形成区G040.96+02.48中的22 GHz水脉泽进行了高精度天体测量。主要结果如下：
- 测定了该水脉泽的自行，其值为 (μα cosδ, μδ) = (-2.06^{+0.53}_{-0.51}, -2.95^{+0.45}_{-0.44}) mas/年。
- 据此推导出该星形成区的三维运动学距离为20.2±3.2 kpc，表明其位置稍微超出外盾牌-半人马臂（Outer Scutum-Centaurus Arm）的传统边界。
- 计算得到的垂直银盘高度达872±139 pc，这清楚地指示了外银盘存在显著的翘曲结构，且该翘曲特征与当前最新的进动翘曲模型（precessing warp model）预测相符。
- 此外，观测揭示出复杂的运动学模式，突出表现为一个异常大的向外径向速度，大小为-32±18 km/s。
- 这项工作显著扩充了极端外银河系（Extreme Outer Galaxy）中拥有精确天体测量数据的星形成区样本，为银河系外围结构研究提供了新的制约。
summary: Accurate astrometric measurements for star-forming regions located on the far side of the Milky Way remain scarce. In this work, we present the astrometric results for a 22\,GHz water maser associated with star-forming region G040.96+02.48 located on the far side of the Milky Way, using the East Asian VLBI Network. The target water maser's proper motion was determined to be ($μ_α\cosδ, μ_δ$) = ($-2.06_{-0.51}^{+0.53}$, $-2.95_{-0.44}^{+0.45}$)~mas~yr$^{-1}$. The derived three-dimensional kinematic distance to the star-forming region is 20.2$\pm$3.2\,kpc, placing it slightly outside the Outer Scutum$-$Centaurus Arm. The corresponding vertical height of 872$\pm$139\,pc indicates a significant warp of the outer Galactic disk, which is in good agreement with the latest precessing warp model. Moreover, the resulting peculiar motions reveal a complex kinematic pattern, characterized by a large outward radial velocity of $-32\pm$18\,km~s$^{-1}$. Our observations substantially expand the valuable sample of star-forming regions with accurate astrometric measurements in the Extreme Outer Galaxy.

title: With arms wide open: a VLT/MUSE view of the mechanisms driving unwinding spiral arms in cluster galaxies
toc_summary: Unwinding spiral arms: tidal vs ram pressure
background_knowledge: 在星系团环境中，星系会受到多种物理机制的作用，其中潮汐相互作用（tidal interactions）和冲压剥离（ram pressure stripping, RPS）是两种主导机制。潮汐力来自邻近星系或星系团整体引力场的拉扯，能够扭曲星系盘、拖出潮汐尾；冲压剥离则是星系在星系团内介质（intracluster medium, ICM）中运动时，受到来自 ICM 的流体动力学压力，导致星系盘中的气体被剥离，并可能间接影响恒星分布。旋涡星系的旋臂对这些扰动尤为敏感，经常出现“松散化”（unwinding）现象，即旋臂打开、缠绕变松。过去研究多认为引力潮汐是主要原因，但近期发现 RPS 也可以单独导致旋臂松散。理解这两种机制在单个星系中的相对贡献，对于揭示星系如何从富气体旋涡星系转变为贫气体透镜星系（S0）至关重要。通过积分场光谱（如 MUSE）开展空间分辨观测，可以同时获取气体和恒星的动力学行为以及恒星族群的年龄分布：引力扰动通常同时影响恒星和气体，而流体动力学压力主要作用于气体。这一框架为区分环境驱动机制提供了有效途径。
contribution: 本研究利用 VLT/MUSE 空间分辨观测数据，对星系团中的两个星系 UG101 和 UG103 进行了分析。它们基于近邻星系的近似程度被分别选为潮汐主导和冲压剥离主导的候选体。研究估算了潮汐力变得显著的星系中心半径（R_tid）。对于 UG101，潮汐半径约在 1.5 倍有效半径处，而松散旋臂特征延伸到该半径之外；其气体和恒星均呈现不规则运动，旋转曲线表明两者运动相似，但气体在一侧被截断、另一侧则向外延伸。对于 UG103，无论是最近的伴星系还是星系团整体势场，都不足以通过潮汐力引发旋臂松散；该星系恒星运动规则，但气体运动受到明显扰动，在可能朝向 ICM 风的一侧气体截断，背风侧气体延伸。恒星族群年龄分布图显示，UG103 中旋臂的浮现和松散化时标与其落入星系团的时间（约 1.6 Gyr）相吻合。结论指出，UG101 的旋臂松散化主要由潮汐相互作用驱动，而 UG103 主要由冲压剥离驱动，但不排除 UG101 中存在两种机制的共同作用。本研究建立了一套基于空间分辨性质识别驱动机制的通用方法框架。
summary: The environmental mechanisms driving unwinding spiral arms in cluster galaxies remain debated. While earlier studies attributed it mainly to gravitational interactions, recent works suggest that RPS alone can induce unwinding. We present a VLT/MUSE spatially resolved analysis to investigate the mechanisms responsible for spiral-arm unwinding in two galaxies, UG101 and UG103, drawn from a larger sample. They are selected as tidal and RPS-driven candidates, respectively, based on the proximity of close neighbors. We estimate the galactocentric radius at which tidal forces, from a companion or the cluster potential, become relevant ($R_{\mathrm{tid}}$). We examine gas and stellar kinematics, exploiting their different responses to gravitational and hydrodynamical perturbations. SINOPSIS is used to map stellar populations in age bins and constrain unwinding timescales. For UG101, we find $R_{\mathrm{tid}} \sim 1.5 R_e$, while the unwound features extend beyond this radius. UG101 shows irregular stellar and gas kinematics; its rotation curve indicates similar motions, although the gas is truncated on one side and extended on the other. For UG103, neither the closest companion nor the cluster appear capable of triggering unwinding. UG103 displays regular stellar but disturbed gas kinematics, with truncation on the disk side likely facing the ICM wind and gas extended in the opposite direction. Stellar population maps show the emergence and unwinding of the spiral arms in UG103 on timescales consistent with its cluster infall time ($\sim 1.6$ Gyr). We conclude that unwinding in UG101 and UG103 is primarily driven by tidal interactions and RPS, respectively, although a combined effect cannot be excluded for UG101. Our methodology provides a framework to identify the mechanisms driving unwinding in cluster galaxies from spatially resolved properties.

title: Halfway to the Peak: Kinematic Signatures of Stable Rotating Disks in Luminous Infrared Galaxies at z=0.5-0.6
toc_summary: Stable rotating disks in IR-luminous galaxies at z~0.5
background_knowledge: 在星系形成与演化的框架中，宇宙正午（cosmic noon，z~2-3）是恒星形成活动最剧烈的时期，此后恒星形成率密度逐渐下降。研究 z~0.5-0.6 的星系——即大约处于宇宙正午与当今之间的“半程”阶段——对于理解星系如何从富气体、高湍流的并合主导状态转变为稳定的盘结构至关重要。红外亮星系（LIRGs/ULIRGs）因其强烈的尘埃红外辐射，往往对应着剧烈的恒星形成或活动星系核（AGN）活动，是探讨这一转变的关键对象。然而，受限于以往望远镜的空间分辨率与中红外波段灵敏度，我们难以在宇宙学距离上解析这些星系内部的电离气体运动学。旋转速度与速度弥散的比值（V/σ）是衡量星系动力学“冷”热程度的核心指标：V/σ ≥ 2 通常意味着旋转支撑的稳定盘，而 V/σ < 1 则暗示弥散主导或并合扰动。JWST 的中红外仪器（MIRI/MRS）首次以亚角秒分辨率提供了中红外原子谱线的积分场光谱，使研究者能够直接描绘遥远星系中星际介质的二维运动学图像，从而从观测上检验“AGN 反馈是否瓦解星系盘”或“盘的不稳定性是否触发 AGN”等核心理论问题。
contribution: 本研究利用 JWST MIRI/MRS 对 6 个 z=0.5-0.6 的红外亮星系进行了运动学分析，首次在中红外波段（[Ar II]6.99μm、[Ne II]12.81μm、H₂ 6.91μm 等原子与分子线）解析了本地宇宙之外的星系内部运动学。通过构建速度场并提取旋转曲线，发现所有目标星系均呈现有序旋转，V/σ ≥ 2，符合稳定旋转盘的特征。尽管部分源存在轻微扰动，但未找到近期主并合或星系尺度电离气体外流的强证据。进一步分析表明，V/σ 与 AGN 贡献比例之间没有明显的相关性，提示 AGN 活动并未显著破坏星系的全局运动学，或者说盘的不稳定性并非触发 AGN 的必要条件。然而，在 AGN 比例较高的星系中，中心速度弥散明显升高，这可能是 AGN 反馈、恒星反馈、吸积过程或核球结构所致的局域湍动。综合来看，这些红外亮星系很可能代表已经演化成型的旋转支撑盘，且 AGN 的激活发生在盘结构建立之后，而非并合主导的阶段。
summary: We present a kinematic study of six infrared-luminous galaxies observed with the Mid-InfraRed Instrument Medium-Resolution Spectrometer (MIRI/MRS) onboard JWST. These galaxies lie at $z = 0.5$--$0.6$, midway between the present day and the peak of cosmic star formation. Our sample spans a range of star formation (SF) and active galactic nucleus (AGN) contributions to the mid-infrared emission. We characterize the dynamical state of these IR-luminous galaxies and assess how AGN activity influences the kinematics of the interstellar medium. Using mid-IR atomic lines, we map galaxy kinematics beyond the local Universe for the first time. The spatial resolution of MIRI/MRS (3.0 kpc for 0.46$\arcsec$ at z $\sim$ 0.55) allows us to resolve the internal kinematics of our targets. We compute kinematic maps in three different emission lines ([Ar II]6.99$μ$m, [Ne II]12.81$μ$m, and H$_2$ 0-0 S(5)6.91$μ$m). Using the [Ar II]6.99$μ$m kinematic maps, we derive rotation curves for these sources. All galaxies exhibit ordered rotation, with \(V/σ\geq 2\), consistent with stable disks. Although some show minor disturbances, we find no strong evidence for recent major mergers or galaxy-wide ionized outflows. We find no correlation between \(V/σ\) and AGN fraction, suggesting AGN activity does not significantly disrupt global kinematics or that disk disruption is not required to trigger AGN. However, galaxies with higher AGN fractions show elevated central dispersions, indicating localized turbulence, possibly due to AGN feedback, stellar feedback, accretion or bulge structure. These IR-luminous galaxies likely represent mature, rotationally supported disks, with AGN activation occurring after disk assembly.

title: The Tracking Tapered Gridded Estimator for the 21-cm power spectrum from the Murchison Widefield Array (MWA) drift scan observations -- III. Improved upper limits at $z = 8.2$ from multiple pointings
toc_summary: Improved 21-cm upper limits from MWA at z~8.2
background_knowledge: 宇宙再电离时期（Epoch of Reionization, EoR）是宇宙演化中第一代发光天体将中性氢重新电离的关键阶段。中性氢的 21 厘米谱线（基态超精细结构跃迁）为探测这一时期的宇宙大尺度结构和物理过程提供了独特的观测窗口。通过测量不同尺度上 21 厘米亮温度（brightness temperature）的功率谱（power spectrum），可以揭示早期星系形成、恒星反馈以及宇宙加热和电离的历史。然而，21 厘米信号极其微弱，比银河系和河外射电源的前景辐射低约 4 到 5 个数量级。因此，实验的关键挑战在于精确校准仪器、有效扣除或避开前景污染，以及发展稳健的统计分析方法。当前，国际上多个低频射电干涉阵列如 MWA、LOFAR 和 HERA 正致力于通过对 EoR 信号的功率谱上限测量来逐步逼近理论预期，同时不断完善观测策略和数据处理技术。
contribution: 本研究利用默奇森宽场阵列（Murchison Widefield Array, MWA）在天顶指向（δ = −26.7°）下、中心频率 154.2 MHz 的漂移扫描（drift scan）观测数据，覆盖赤经范围 349.0° 至 70.0°，包含 163 个间隔 0.5° 的指向中心（pointing centers）。作者首先测量了均方角度亮温度涨落 D_ℓ 随赤经的变化，发现位于主波束的明亮展源天炉座 A（Fornax A）在 α ≈ 50.0° 处产生显著峰值，可能的第一旁瓣对应峰值在 α ≈ 5.0°。对于 α ≤ 22.0° 且 ℓ ≥ 200 的区域，D_ℓ ∝ ℓ^2，符合点源的泊松涨落特征。进一步提取了再电离时期的 21 厘米均方亮温度涨落 Δ^2(k) 随赤经的分布，确认天炉座 A 在 α ≈ 50.5° 附近造成严重污染，而赤经 358.5° 至 11.5° 区间前景相对干净，最适合 EoR 科学分析。在 α = 11.0° 的指向中心获得了最佳单个 2σ 上限：Δ^2_{UL}(k) = (173.13)^2 mK^2（k = 0.161 Mpc^{-1}）。非相干合并 23 个指向中心后，得到 Δ^2_{UL}(k) = (98.67)^2 mK^2（k = 0.156 Mpc^{-1}），这是迄今 MWA 最严格的 EoR 上限，比以往 MWA 结果压低了约 3 倍，但分别比 LOFAR 和 HERA 的最佳上限高约 2 倍和 21 倍，且仍比理论预言高出约 3 个数量级。
summary: We analyze zenith-pointing $(δ=-26.7^{\circ})$ Murchison Widefield Array (MWA) $ν_c=154.2 \,{\rm MHz}$ drift scan observations covering $349.0^{\circ} \le α\le 70.0^{\circ}$ with 163 pointing centers (PCs) spaced by $0.5^{\circ}$. We measure $D_{\ell}$, the mean-squared angular brightness temperature fluctuations, as a function of $α$. A broad peak at $α\approx 50.0^{\circ}$ corresponds to the bright extended source Fornax~A in the main lobe of the primary beam. A smaller peak at $α\approx 5.0^{\circ}$ possibly corresponds to Fornax~A in the first sidelobe. For $α\leq 22.0^{\circ}$ and $\ell \ge 200$, we find $D_{\ell} \propto \ell^2$, which we interpret as Poisson fluctuations from point sources. We present $Δ^2(k)$, the mean-squared 21-cm brightness temperature fluctuations from the Epoch of Reionization, as a function of $α$. Fornax~A causes strong contamination near $α\approx 50.5^{\circ}$, elsewhere several PCs are consistent with noise. The range $358.5^{\circ} \leq α\leq 11.5^{\circ}$ is relatively foreground-free and best suited for EoR science. The PC at $α= 11.0^{\circ}$ yields the best $2σ$ upper limit $Δ^{2}_{\rm UL}(k) = (173.13)^{2}\,{\rm mK^{2}}$ at $k = 0.161\,{\rm Mpc^{-1}}$. We incoherently combine $23$ PCs to obtain $Δ_{\rm UL}^2(k)=(98.67)^{2}\,{\rm mK}^{2}$ at $k=0.156\,{\rm Mpc}^{-1}$. This is the tightest upper limit from the MWA, being $\approx3$ times lower than earlier MWA limits, but $\approx2$ and $\approx21$ times higher than the LOFAR and HERA limits, respectively, and $\approx3$ orders of magnitude above theoretical predictions.

title: Discovery of ultra-fast outflows with v$_{\rm out}>0.3 \rm c$ in local bright active galactic nuclei
toc_summary: Ultra-fast outflows in local bright AGNs
background_knowledge: 活动星系核 (Active Galactic Nuclei, AGN) 是星系中心超大质量黑洞吸积物质并释放巨大能量的现象。在 AGN 的光谱中，常观测到由核区高速外流物质产生的蓝移吸收线，其中速度超过 0.1 倍光速 (c) 的称为超快外流 (Ultra-fast Outflows, UFOs)。UFOs 被认为是由吸积盘上的辐射压或磁过程驱动，携带可观的能量与动量，能够反馈到宿主星系的星际介质中，从而调节恒星形成与黑洞增长，是理解 AGN 与星系协同演化 (AGN-galaxy coevolution) 的关键环节。这类外流通常通过 X 射线波段的高电离离子 (如 Fe XXV/XXVI 的 Kα 或 Kβ 线) 吸收特征来探测，因为高温气体在 X 射线能段辐射最显著。过去对 UFOs 的系统搜寻主要集中在 10 keV 以下，较高能段 (7–12 keV) 的搜寻相对欠缺，限制了对更高速度、更高电离度外流的探索。此外，UFOs 的出现率与 AGN 性质 (如爱丁顿比、黑洞质量) 之间的关系仍是未明朗的问题，其短时标变化特性也尚未被充分刻画。
contribution: 本研究首次对一批本地 (z < 0.2) 亮 AGN 进行了能量上限达 12 keV 的高能 X 射线光谱系统搜寻，旨在探测超快外流。利用 XMM-Newton 卫星的 33 次观测数据，在 2–12 keV 波段联合了直接连续谱与反射成分进行光谱建模，重点关注 7–12 keV 范围内的蓝移吸收线。通过蒙特卡洛 (Monte Carlo) 模拟严格评估吸收线的统计显著性，以 >95% 置信水平在 6 个源中确认了 UFOs 的探测，占总样本的 18%。根据吸收线能量导出外流速度，部分源的速度超过 0.4c，彰显该工作将速度分布推向了比以往 (10 keV 限域) 更高的能区。分析未发现 UFOs 的存在与超大质量黑洞吸积性质 (如爱丁顿比) 之间的明显关联。此外，研究还指出了 UFOs 的时变特性，为进一步探究这类极端外流的物理机制与反馈效应提供了重要依据。
summary: Ultra-fast outflows (UFOs) are mildly relativistic (outflow velocity $v_{out}>0.1c$) nuclear winds detected as blueshifted absorption lines from highly ionized, dense gas in the X-ray spectra of active galactic nuclei. The AGN feedback mechanism is believed to be powered by these outflows, which can inject a large amount of energy and momentum into the surrounding interstellar medium, shaping the coevolution of the AGNs and their host galaxies. We performed a systematic search and rigorous statistical assessment of the presence of UFOs in the 7-12 keV band, in a sample of bright local AGNs. This study also aims to understand whether the presence and characteristics of UFOs depend on the state of the sources, by studying the relations between the incidence of UFOs and the accretion properties of AGNs. We collected X-ray spectroscopic flux-limited XMM data of 33 observations of local (z<0.2) type 1 AGNs. We modeled their spectra in the 2-12 keV band using a combination of direct-continuum and reflection components and searched for absorption features. This represents the first systematic search for UFOs up to 12 keV. We performed Monte Carlo simulations to assess the statistical significance of the detected lines. We report strong detections of UFOs in six sources of the sample at the >95% confidence level via MC simulations, corresponding to a fraction of 18% in our sample. From the observed energies of each absorption line, we evaluated the respective wind velocities, which in some cases exceed 40\% of the speed of light. The velocity distribution found in this work is therefore shifted to higher energies than those found in previous searches for UFOs in local sources, which were limited to 10 keV. Moreover, our analysis shows no correlation between the accretion properties of the SMBHs and the presence of winds. Furthermore, our study highlights the temporal variability of UFOs.

title: Diffusion-based Galaxy Simulations for the Roman High Latitude Survey
toc_summary: Diffusion models generate realistic Roman galaxy images
background_knowledge: 弱引力透镜（weak lensing）是当前和未来宇宙学巡天探测暗能量、暗物质和大尺度结构的关键探针。为了将宇宙剪切（cosmic shear）信号的测量精度提升至亚百分比级别，必须通过高度逼真的图像模拟来精确标定剪切测量中的系统性误差。传统的模拟方法多依赖解析的光度轮廓模型（如 Sérsic 轮廓），虽然高效，但难以完整刻画高分辨率观测所揭示的星系非规则、非参数化的复杂形态。近年来，以扩散模型（diffusion models）为代表的生成式人工智能在图像生成领域取得了突破性进展。这类模型能够从真实天体物理数据中学习星系的复杂形态分布，进而生成高度保真且物理自洽的星系图像，为突破解析模型的局限性提供了全新途径。该方向的核心目标是为大规模弱透镜实验（如罗曼太空望远镜的高纬度巡天）构建能够覆盖真实星系形态多样性、且可扩展的模拟样本，从而更好地控制形状测量与暗弱天体偏袒（faint object bias）等系统效应。
contribution: 本文提出并验证了一套基于扩散模型的罗曼太空望远镜高纬度巡天（Roman High Latitude Survey）星系图像模拟框架。研究团队利用哈勃边疆场（GOODS-S 和 GOODS-N）的多波段 JWST/NIRCam 深度观测数据，通过点扩散函数匹配、像素尺度转换和干扰源掩模等处理，在保留相关噪声特性的前提下，将原始图像转换为罗曼望远镜的观测体制（包括 Y、J、H 三个滤光片）。这些数据被用于训练一个去噪扩散概率模型（denoising diffusion probabilistic model），以生成对应波段的星系切图（postage stamps）。作者使用独立数据集和统一的光度测量流程对生成样本进行了验证，比较了星等、尺寸、椭率、峰值表面亮度及三波段颜色等关键观测量。结果表明，生成样本不仅准确复现了这些性质的单变量边缘分布，还较好地捕捉了它们之间的协变结构，仅在参数空间的低占据区域存在适度偏差。该项工作表明，扩散模型为分析性模拟提供了一种可扩展且物理驱动的替代方案，能够为罗曼弱透镜定标以及未来宇宙学实验提供高保真度的星系样本。
summary: Future weak lensing analyses with the Nancy Grace Roman Space Telescope will require highly realistic image simulations to control shear systematics at unprecedented precision. A key limitation of existing approaches is their reliance on analytic light-profile models, which cannot fully capture the complex, non-parametric morphologies revealed by high-resolution observations. We present a diffusion-based framework for generating realistic galaxy image simulations tailored to the weak lensing requirements of the Roman High Latitude Survey. We construct Roman-like galaxy images from multi-band JWST/NIRCam observations in the GOODS-S and GOODS-N fields, transforming them into the Roman observing regime through point-spread-function matching, pixel-scale conversion, and interloper masking that preserves correlated noise properties. These data are used to train a denoising diffusion probabilistic model to generate multi-band galaxy postage stamps in the Roman Y, J, and H filters. We validate the generated sample against an independent dataset using a consistent photometric pipeline, comparing key galaxy observables including magnitude, size, ellipticity, peak surface brightness, and three-band colors. The generated galaxies reproduce both the marginal distributions and the covariance structure of these properties, with only modest deviations in low-occupancy regions of parameter space. These results demonstrate that diffusion models provide a scalable and physically motivated alternative to analytic simulations, enabling high-fidelity galaxy populations for Roman weak lensing calibration and, more generally, for survey preparation in upcoming cosmological experiments.

title: The Effects of Accretion Feedback on Stellar Evolution in AGN Disks
toc_summary: Accretion feedback limits stellar growth in AGN disks
background_knowledge: 在活动星系核（AGN）的吸积盘中，极端的高密度和强辐射环境为恒星的形成与演化提供了独特的场所。传统恒星演化模型往往忽略周围气体对恒星的吸积作用，但在 AGN 盘中，恒星可能以极高的速率从盘内吸积物质，这会深刻改变其内部结构与演化路径。然而，吸积过程中释放的引力势能和辐射焓会产生反馈效应，可能抑制进一步的吸积。近年来，辐射流体力学模拟揭示了这种反馈的重要性，但此前的恒星演化计算通常未考虑这些效应。该子领域的研究核心在于理解 AGN 盘内恒星的吸积、质量损失、反馈机制以及它们如何影响恒星的最终命运、盘的化学增丰以及相关的暂现源现象。
contribution: 本文通过构建一个半解析的恒星结构与演化模型，首次系统地纳入了吸积反馈效应，并在跨越不同超大质量黑洞（$M_\bullet/M_\odot \in [10^6, 10^9]$）的 α 盘模型参数空间中进行了计算。研究发现，吸积反馈将恒星的吸积率限制在约 $10^{-1}\,M_\odot\,\mathrm{yr}^{-1}$ 以下，从而降低了恒星演化对盘性质的敏感性，并抑制了原本可能发生的失控吸积。这拓宽了恒星能够达到长寿‘不死’平衡态（吸积与质量损失相平衡）的参数空间。当进一步考虑恒星在盘中打开间隙的效应时，吸积反馈显著改变了恒星性质：吸积率和质量损失率降低超过一个数量级，减弱了吸积激波，从而使平衡态恒星的质量和半径增大。这些更高的质量对应更高的内禀光度，意味着忽略吸积反馈可能低估了盘化学增丰的速率。此外，该反馈效应对于预测 AGN 盘内恒星族群的性质及相关暂现源现象至关重要。
summary: Stars embedded in the accretion disks of active galactic nuclei (AGN) can accrete rapidly from their surroundings, dramatically altering their structure and evolution. However, feedback from the release of gravitational potential energy and radiative enthalpy by accreting gas can limit accretion rates, as recently demonstrated in radiation hydrodynamics simulations. To determine the importance of these effects neglected in earlier stellar evolution calculations, we incorporate these feedback processes into a semi-analytical model of stellar structure and evolution and conduct a suite of calculations spanning a broad parameter space of AGN disk conditions drawn from $α$-disk models with central black hole masses $M_\bullet/M_\odot \in [10^6, 10^9]$. We find that accretion feedback limits stellar accretion rates below $\sim 10^{-1}\,M_\odot\,\mathrm{yr}^{-1}$, reducing the sensitivity of stellar evolution on disk properties. This suppression eliminates runaway accretion in models where it would otherwise occur, broadening the parameter space over which stars can reach long-lived ``immortal'' equilibria between accretion and mass loss. When gap opening is also accounted for, accretion feedback significantly alters stellar properties: it can reduce accretion and mass-loss rates by over an order of magnitude, reducing the strength of accretion shocks and thereby increasing equilibrium stellar masses and radii. These higher masses correspond to higher intrinsic luminosities, suggesting that neglecting accretion feedback may lead to an underestimate of disk chemical enrichment rates. Additionally, accretion feedback is important for predicting the properties of stellar populations within AGN disks, and associated transient phenomena.

title: Hessian-based photometric substructure as an evolutionary tracer of OB cluster candidates in M31
toc_summary: Hessian-based substructure traces OB cluster age
background_knowledge: 星团是由同一分子云坍缩形成的恒星群体，在其形成初期，内部气体和恒星分布往往呈现高度不规则、块状或丝状结构，这种“子结构”是引力束缚尚未完全建立、动力学弛豫尚未充分进行的表现。随着星团演化，两体弛豫、质量分层、气体耗散和潮汐剥离等过程会逐渐抹平这些初始的子结构，使得星团的光度分布趋于平滑、对称。因此，星团内部的光度子结构携带了关于其动力学年龄的重要信息。在无法直接分辨单星的遥远星团或部分可分辨的年轻星团中，利用集成光度来量化子结构成为一种重要的演化示踪手段。传统上，星团年龄主要依靠颜色-星等图（CMD）拟合确定，但这种方法要求较高的分辨率和精确的测光。对于部分可分辨的星团，结构参数（如紧密度、椭率、二阶矩等）可以补充年龄估计。近年来，基于图像处理的技术（如功率谱分析、小波分解、Hessian 矩阵等）被引入来提取高阶光度统计量，它们对局部的光度梯度变化敏感，能更精细地刻画子结构的复杂度。在邻近星系（如 M31）中，借助高分辨率空间望远镜数据，研究者可以系统地研究年轻星团的早期结构演化，从而检验星团形成理论和动力学演化模型。这一领域正逐渐建立起结构-年龄的经验关系，为不具备 CMD 定年条件的星团提供替代方法。
contribution: 本研究利用哈勃空间望远镜（HST）的 PHAT 和 PHAST 巡天图像，构建了包含 747 个 M31 中 OB 星团候选体的更新星表。为了量化部分可分辨星团候选体的内部光度子结构，提出了一种新型无量纲结构度量——迹变异系数（CVtr），该系数源自四个 HST 波段图像的 Hessian 矩阵。将样本与已有独立颜色-星等图（CMD）年龄估计的 M31 星团进行交叉匹配，获得了 247 个共有天体。分析发现，在紫外和蓝光波段，CVtr 与星团年龄之间存在统计上显著的反相关关系，表明随着星团年龄增长，其内部光度分布变得更加平滑。Bootstrap 重采样验证了这一趋势的稳健性。同时，通过前向建模生成合成星团并采用相同流程进行分析，在简化但物理合理的假设下，成功恢复了单调的 CVtr-年龄关系。这些结果证明，在 CMD 校准的年龄段（约 10-300 Myr）内，二阶光度结构携带着可测量的演化信息，为未充分分辨星团的年龄估计提供了新的工具。
summary: Using \textit{Hubble Space Telescope} images from the PHAT and PHAST surveys, we construct an updated catalogue of 747 OB cluster (OBC) candidates. We introduce a dimensionless structural metric, the trace coefficient of variation ($CV_{\rm tr}$), derived from the Hessian matrix in four \textit{HST} bands, to quantify the internal photometric substructure of partially resolved OBC candidates. Cross-matching with the subset of M31 clusters that have independent colour--magnitude diagram (CMD) age estimates yields 247 objects in common. We find statistically significant anti-correlations between $CV_{\rm tr}$ and age in the UV and blue bands, suggesting a progressive smoothing of the light distribution as clusters evolve. Bootstrap resampling confirms the robustness of these trends. Forward modelling of synthetic clusters analysed with the same pipeline recovers a monotonic $CV_{\rm tr}$--age relation under simplified but physically motivated assumptions. These results show that second-order photometric structure contains measurable evolutionary information within the CMD-calibrated regime ($\sim10$--300~Myr).

title: pyTANSPEC v1.0 and HxRGproc: Updated packages to Clean and Reduce TANSPEC data
toc_summary: Upgraded data reduction for TANSPEC instrument
background_knowledge: 近红外（0.55–2.5 μm）光谱与成像技术是地基天文观测的重要手段，能够探测尘埃遮蔽区域、低温天体及高红移目标。然而，近红外探测器（如HgCdTe的HxRG系列）存在非线性响应、暗电流、宇宙线事件等非理想特性，且天空背景强且变化快。因此，从原始数据中提取可靠科学信息需要专门的数据处理管线，通常包括探测器校正（去非线性、去坏像素、背景扣除）、光谱抽取、波长定标与流量定标等步骤。TANSPEC 是安装在印度 3.6 米 Devasthal 光学望远镜上的近红外光谱仪，具备低分辨率（R~100–350）和交叉色散（XD，R~2500）两种模式，覆盖多种狭缝宽度。为高效处理其产生的海量数据，开发了 pyTANSPEC 与 HxRGproc 软件包，旨在为用户提供从原始帧到科学级光谱的自动化流程，降低人工干预，提升数据质量与一致性。
contribution: 本文介绍了 pyTANSPEC v1.0 与 HxRGproc 的升级版本。pyTANSPEC 原有管线仅支持交叉色散模式下两种狭缝（0.5" 和 1.0"）的波长定标光谱。新版本扩展至所有可用狭缝（0.5"、0.75"、1.0"、1.5"、2.0"、4.0"）的低分辨率与交叉色散模式，并采用模板匹配方法实现更精确的波长定标，同时新增了流量定标步骤。另一方面，HxRGproc 专为 H1RG 和 H2RG 探测器的非破坏性读出帧设计，升级后适配 TANSPEC 的 H2RG 探测器，并部署于服务器端，可自动执行非线性校正、饱和像素标记、粉红噪声去除与宇宙线剔除，确保用户获得经过预清洁和线性化处理的数据。
summary:
TIFR-ARIES Near-Infrared Spectrometer (TANSPEC) is a spectrograph-cum-imager operating over the wavelength range $0.55 - 2.5~μ$m. The instrument is mounted on the 3.6-m Devasthal Optical Telescope (3.6-m DOT). It offers two resolution modes: Low Resolution (LR) with $R\sim100-350$ and Cross-Dispersed (XD) via various slits of different widths (0.5", 0.75", 1.0", 1.5", 2.0" and 4.0"). The LR mode provides a resolving power ($R$) of $\sim 100-350$, while the XD mode achieves $R\sim2500$ using the 0.5" slit. The previous version of the data reduction pipeline supported only wavelength-calibrated XD mode spectra and was limited to two slits (S-0.5 and S-1.0). In this work, we present an upgraded version of pyTANSPEC. The upgraded pipeline not only improves the data extraction algorithm but also introduces several new features for users. It now enables the reduction of spectra from all available slits for both LR and XD modes. The upgraded version also implements a template-matching method for more precise wavelength calibration. Additionally, a step for flux calibration is also included.
  Alongside pyTANSPEC, we upgraded HxRGproc, a Python package for cleaning and generating slope images from Non-Destructive Readout (NDR) frames taken with H1RG and H2RG detectors. The package performs non-linearity correction, flags saturated pixels, removes pink noise, and eliminates cosmic ray events. HxRGproc is updated to work for the H2RG detector of TANSPEC and is set up on the TANSPEC server, ensuring users receive data that are pre-cleaned and non-linearity corrected.

title: CSST Preparations: Galaxy Completeness and Sérsic Profile Fitting across the Wide, Deep, and Extreme Fields
toc_summary: CSST completeness and Sérsic fitting assessment
background_knowledge: 在大型光学巡天中，对星系样本进行完备且准确的形态学测量是研究星系形成与演化的核心前提。星系的表面亮度分布通常用 Sérsic 模型（Sérsic profile）来参数化，该模型通过 Sérsic 指数 n 描述星系光分布的集中程度：n=1 对应指数盘，常见于旋涡星系；n=4 对应 de Vaucouleurs 轮廓，常见于椭圆星系。巡天的探测完备性（completeness）决定了我们能够多大程度上发现并测量不同红移、不同亮度的星系，而测量偏差（bias）和不确定性（uncertainty）直接影响如星等、有效半径、面亮度等物理量的可靠性。为了科学地规划巡天策略、优化曝光时间分配以及预判科学产出，天文学家常通过模拟巡天图像（mock images）注入已知参数的假星系，然后运行真实的数据处理流程（源检测、测光、形态拟合）来量化巡天性能。这一方法对于即将投入运行的新一代空间望远镜（如中国的 CSST）尤为关键，因为其高分辨率和多波段观测将触及前所未有的深度和样本量，提前摸清仪器的“软肋”和系统效应是早期科学研究顺利开展的保障。
contribution:
本研究为 CSST 巡天生成了 470,526 张模拟图像，其中包含 22,406 个恒星质量大于 10^9 太阳质量的模拟星系。这些星系的参数通过真实 HST 观测数据校准，覆盖测光红移范围 0 < z ≲ 7，并分布于 CSST 的七个滤波器和三个计划观测深度（宽场、深场、极深场）。研究团队随后执行标准源检测并使用 Sérsic 模型进行形态拟合，得到以下关键发现：
- 在 g 波段，点源的 95% 完备星等（m_95）在宽场、深场、极深场分别达到 26.3、27.4 和 28.5 mag；对于延展星系，由于表面亮度被展源稀释，完备星等相应变亮，分别为 24.4、25.9 和 27.1 mag。
- 就红移完备性而言，极深场在 z ≲ 3–4 范围内仍能保持 >95% 的探测完备度，而深场和宽场对应的红移上限分别约在 z≈1 和 z≈0.5。
- 使用 GALFIT、AstroPhot 和 SourceXtractor++ 三种拟合代码，定量评估了星系星等（m）、有效半径（R_e）、有效表面亮度（μ_e）、Sérsic 指数（n）和轴比（q）的测量偏差与弥散。结果显示，随着星系变暗、信噪比下降，星等、有效半径和有效面亮度被系统性高估，而 Sérsic 指数和轴比则被低估；这些偏差及其离散度在更深的场中显著减小。
- 总体而言，该研究为 CSST 早期科学观测和大型 legacy 巡天中的样本选取以及形态参数测量的可靠性提供了坚实的定量参照。
summary: The upcoming imaging survey of the Chinese Space-station Survey Telescope (CSST) will deliver high-resolution imaging of an unprecedented number of galaxies for galaxy studies. To understand CSST's capability, and to support the preparation of early-science programs, we generate 470,526 mock CSST images for 22,406 simulated galaxies with $M_*>10^9 M_\odot$, whose parameters are calibrated to match real HST observations spanning photometric redshift $0<z\lesssim7$, across seven CSST filters and three planned survey depths: wide, deep, and extreme. We then perform source detection and Sérsic fitting. For point sources, we found that the 95% completeness magnitude in the g band reaches 26.3, 27.4, and 28.5 mag for the wide, deep, and extreme fields, respectively. For extended galaxies, their spatial extent dilutes the surface brightness, leading to brighter 95% completeness magnitudes of 24.4, 25.9, and 27.1 mag. The detection completeness remains above 95% at $z\lesssim3-4$ in the extreme field, while the corresponding redshift limits are $z\approx1$ in the deep field and $z\approx0.5$ in the wide field. Using three fitting codes, GALFIT, AstroPhot, and SourceXtractor++, we quantify measurement biases and uncertainties in galaxy magnitude ($m$), effective radius ($R_e$), effective surface brightness ($μ_e$), Sérsic index ($n$), and axis ratio ($q$). On average, for fainter galaxies, the reduced signal-to-noise ratio leads to systematic overestimates in $m$, $R_e$, and $μ_e$, and underestimates in $n$ and $q$. These biases, as well as the associated scatter, become progressively smaller in deeper fields. Overall, our results provide quantitative constraints on sample selection and the robustness of morphological measurements in CSST early-science and legacy surveys.

title: Current Unsolved Problems in Planetary Nebulae Research
toc_summary: Unsolved problems in planetary nebulae research
background_knowledge:
行星状星云（Planetary Nebulae, PNe）是低质量到中等质量恒星（约 1–8 倍太阳质量）演化到末期的产物。当这类恒星耗尽核心的氢燃料并离开渐近巨星分支（AGB）后，会抛射出外层气体包层，而残留的高温核心（即将成为白矮星）发出的强烈紫外辐射将抛射物电离，形成可见的发光星云。

从物理图像上看，行星状星云的研究不仅涉及恒星演化的最后阶段，还与星际介质（ISM）的化学富集、双星相互作用、尘埃与分子的形成等过程紧密相连。传统理论认为，单星演化能够产生近似球对称的星云，但实际观测发现 PNe 展现出极为丰富的形态：圆形、椭圆、双极乃至多极结构。这暗示着诸如星风碰撞、磁流体动力学、双星或行星伴星等复杂物理过程在形态塑造中扮演了关键角色。

当前该领域的整体研究概况可以概括为：一方面，多波段观测（光学、红外、射电）与高空间分辨率仪器（如 HST、ALMA）极大地增进了对视向结构、尘埃分布和分子气体分布的了解；另一方面，仍有一系列相互关联的核心问题长期悬而未决——包括真实三维形态的还原、多极结构的起源、尘埃和分子相对于光学辐射区的精确位置、主星云之外的大尺度晕结构、双星在星云演化中的确切作用，以及所谓的“丰度矛盾”（即不同方法测得的元素丰度存在系统性偏差）等。这些问题的存在，意味着我们对于中低质量恒星晚期的质量损失、包层抛射和星云电离等基本过程的物理图像尚不完善。
contribution:
本文系统梳理了当前行星状星云研究中存在的若干关键未解问题，并基于最新的观测结果与理论进展，提出了未来的攻关方向。具体而言，论文聚焦于以下科学难题：

• **真实三维形态结构**：多数 PNe 的投影形态容易造成误判，如何从二维图像反推准确的三维密度分布仍是一大挑战。
• **多极行星状星云的起源**：一些星云呈现复杂的多极对称性，其形成机制（如双星作用、快速旋转、磁场等）尚不明确。
• **尘埃和分子的空间分布**：尘埃与分子气体相对于光学电离区域的位置和运动学关联，直接关系到星云内部物理条件的刻画。
• **主星云之外的大尺度结构**：许多 PNe 存在外围晕或更扩展的壳层，这些结构携带着恒星早期质量损失的信息，但观测和解释仍很有限。
• **双星在演化中的角色**：双星相互作用（公共包层、伴星吸积等）在多大程度上主导了 PNe 的形成和形态，仍需通过统计和个案研究来澄清。
• **行星状星云现象的精确定义**：随着发现越来越多过渡型天体，现有分类标准面临挑战，亟需一个更严谨的物理定义。
• **元素丰度矛盾**：基于碰撞激发线与复合线得到的化学丰度长期存在系统性偏差，其根源可能涉及温度涨落、化学不均匀性或其他未知机制，至今仍未解决。

论文在总结以上问题的现有观测约束后，提出了诸如高灵敏度积分场光谱、多波段协同成像、大样本统计以及先进三维辐射转移模拟等未来可行的解决途径，为后续研究指明了方向。
summary: While there has been significant progress in our understanding of the origin and evolu-tion of planetary nebulae in the last 50 years, there remain several unsolved problems. These include the true 3D morphological structure of the nebulae, origin of multipolar nebulae, the dust and molecular distribution relative to the optical nebulosity, large-scale structures outside of the main nebulae, the relevance of binarity to planetary nebulae evolution, and a precise definition of the planetary nebula phenomenon. The long-standing problem of elemental abundance discrepancy still remains unsolved. In this paper, we summarize current observations related to these problems and present possible future directions to tackle them.

title: The POKEMON Speckle Survey of Nearby M dwarfs. IV. Distance-Limited Catalog (POKEMON-DLC)
toc_summary: Updated M dwarf multiplicity from POKEMON speckle survey
background_knowledge: 太阳系周围约15秒差距（约50光年）以内，恒星数量以M矮星（M dwarfs）占绝对多数。这类恒星质量低（约0.08–0.6倍太阳质量）、光度暗、温度低，是银河系中数量最多的恒星族群。研究M矮星的多重性（multiplicity）——即它们是以单星、双星还是多星系统存在——对于理解恒星形成理论、初始质量函数以及行星系统的形成环境至关重要。传统上，通过直接成像、视向速度等方法可以搜寻伴星，但紧密的双星系统常常受限于望远镜的衍射极限。散斑干涉测量（speckle interferometry）利用一系列短曝光图像冻结大气湍流，再通过傅里叶分析重建高频信息，从而突破衍射极限，获得毫角秒量级的分辨率，成为探测M矮星近距离伴星的利器。近年来，盖亚（Gaia）卫星提供了史无前例的高精度天体测量（astrometry），使得构建真正体积限制（volume-limited）的邻近恒星样本成为可能。在这一背景下，POKEMON（Pervasive Overview of Kompanions of Every M Dwarf in Our Neighborhood）巡天应运而生，旨在系统性地观测附近M矮星主星，获取完整的多重性统计，从而描绘太阳邻域（Solar Neighborhood）低质量恒星的系统架构。
contribution: 本文提供了POKEMON巡天的第四部分工作：一个距离限制的补充星表（POKEMON-DLC）。基于盖亚（Gaia）的天体测量数据，研究团队在原454颗附近M矮星主星样本之外，识别出66颗被遗漏的、位于15 pc以内的额外M矮星主星，使得POKEMON星表中的超冷矮星（晚于M6.5型）主星数量增加了1.6倍。通过散斑观测（speckle observations），作者在这些新增样本中探测到4个可能的束缚伴星（bound companions）。结合文献调研，论文更新了M矮星系统的投影间距（projected separation）分布，发现分布峰值位于7.91天文单位（au），对数标准差为σ(log a)=1.1，标准误差为0.10。同时，更新后的M矮星多星率（stellar multiplicity rate）为22.7±1.8%，伴星率（companion rate）为27.5±2.0%。这些结果凸显了盖亚数据在识别邻近低质量源方面的优势，并指出未来的SPHEREx任务将进一步揭示太阳邻域低质量星族的本质。
summary: The Solar Neighborhood is dominated by stars smaller, colder, and fainter than the Sun: the M dwarfs. If we are to understand the context in which the Sun formed and evolved, then we must investigate the system architectures of our low-mass neighbors. We have therefore carried out the Pervasive Overview of Kompanions of Every M Dwarf in Our Neighborhood (POKEMON) speckle survey of nearby M-dwarf primaries. We created the survey with the goal of observing a volume-limited (north of -30 degrees) sample of M-dwarf primaries through M9 out to 15 pc at diffraction-limited resolution. Pre-Gaia parallax measurements yielded a catalog of 454 nearby M-dwarf primaries. However, the precise astrometry from Gaia indicated that there are additional low-mass sources within 15 pc. Here we present the POKEMON-Distance Limited Catalog (POKEMON-DLC), a supplemental catalog that consists of speckle observations for the 66 additional M-dwarf primaries identified by Gaia, increasing the number of ultracool dwarf (later than M6.5) primaries in the POKEMON catalog by a factor of 1.6. In our observations we detect four likely bound companions. After carrying out a literature search for additional companions, we update the projected separation distribution and find a peak at 7.91 au (σlog(a) = 1.1, SElog(a) = 0.10). We also update the M-dwarf stellar multiplicity and companion rates, and find values of 22.7 p/m 1.8% and 27.5 p/m 2.0%, respectively. These results emphasize the utility of Gaia for identifying low-mass, nearby sources, and we find that ensuing characterization of these sources by SPHEREx will continue to clarify the nature of the Solar Neighborhood.

title: Dynamical masses of young stellar objects with the VLBA: DYNAMO-VLBA: Radio binary stars in Orion
toc_summary: Dynamical masses of young Orion binaries
background_knowledge:
恒星形成与演化是天体物理的核心课题。年轻恒星天体 (Young Stellar Objects, YSOs) 的质量决定了它们未来的演化路径，但传统上 YSO 质量的测定主要依赖将观测到的光谱能量分布 (SED) 与理论模型进行拟合。这种方法高度依赖于前主序 (pre-main-sequence, PMS) 演化模型的准确性，而不同模型之间常存在显著差异，因此通过直接的动力学方法（如双星轨道）测量 YSO 质量对检验和校准恒星演化模型至关重要。

甚长基线干涉测量 (Very Long Baseline Interferometry, VLBI) 技术通过联合分布极远的射电望远镜，可达到毫角秒乃至微角秒级别的超高角分辨率，是精确测量天体位置和运动 (天体测量学) 的强大工具。借助 VLBA (Very Long Baseline Array) 等设备，天文学家能够追踪年轻恒星在双星系统中的轨道运动，进而基于开普勒定律独立地、不依赖于模型地求得恒星质量。

猎户座 (Orion) 分子云复合体是距离太阳系最近的大质量恒星形成区之一 (约 400 秒差距)，其中孕育了大量处于不同演化阶段的 YSOs，包括众多双星和多星系统，因此成为开展此类动力学研究的天然实验室。同时，一些中等质量恒星的射电辐射机制（如非热辐射）也为探索其磁场活动提供了珍贵窗口，对理解恒星磁场的起源具有重要意义。
contribution:
本文基于 DYNAMO-VLBA 项目在猎户座复合体开展的多历元 VLBA 巡天，报告了对 19 个射电源（属于 15 个双星或多星系统）的高精度天体测量结果。主要发现包括：

- 在 4 个两颗子星均被探测到的目视双星中，成功拟合出开普勒轨道，获得了不依赖于模型的动力学质量。特别是 Brun 656 和 HD 294300，其 VLBA 动力学质量与基于光谱能量分布 (SED) 的质量估计高度一致，为前主序演化模型提供了宝贵的基准校准。
- 确认 NU Ori C 是一颗约 7 倍太阳质量的中等质量恒星，并探测到非热射电辐射，这为大质量恒星边界附近的磁活动提供了罕见的观测证据。
- 部分源表现出显著的天体测量加速或周期性的残差，揭示了不可见的伴星，从而将动力学约束扩展到了仅有一颗射电子星被探测到的系统。

这些成果展示了 VLBI 天体测量技术在获取年轻双星精确、模型无关质量方面的卓越能力，为恒星演化模型提供了关键的经验锚点，并为中等质量恒星磁性的起源带来了新的认识。
summary: We present results from a multi-epoch Very Long Baseline Array (VLBA) survey conducted as part of the DYNAMO-VLBA project, aimed at measuring the dynamical masses of young stellar systems in the Orion complex. Our observations include 19 radio sources associated with 15 binary or multiple young systems. For four visual binaries in which both components were detected, the derived Keplerian orbits yield model-independent stellar masses; in particular, Brun~656 and HD~294300 show excellent agreement between VLBA-based and spectral-energy-distribution-based estimates, providing valuable benchmarks for pre-main-sequence evolutionary models. The component NU Ori C is confirmed as an intermediate-mass ($\sim$7\,M$_\odot$) star with nonthermal radio emission, offering rare evidence of magnetic activity near the boundary with the high-mass regime. Several additional sources exhibit astrometric accelerations or periodic residuals, revealing unseen companions and extending dynamical constraints to systems with only one radio-emitting component. These results highlight the capability of very long baseline interferometry astrometry to obtain precise and model-independent masses of young binaries, providing critical empirical anchors for stellar evolution models and new insights into the origin of magnetism in intermediate-mass stars.

title: A Morphological Identification and Study of Radio Galaxies from LoTSS DR2. III. The Multiwavelength Analysis of Winged Radio Galaxies
toc_summary: Multiwavelength study of winged radio galaxies
background_knowledge: 射电星系是活动星系核（AGN）中一类具有大规模射电喷流和瓣状结构的天体，其喷流可延伸至宿主星系之外数十万光年。传统上根据射电形态分为 Fanaroff-Riley I 型（FR I，边缘暗淡）和 II 型（FR II，边缘增亮）。翼状射电星系（winged radio galaxies, WRGs）是一类形态特异的子类，主要包括 X 形（XRGs）和 Z 形（ZRGs）射电星系。XRGs 拥有一对主瓣和一对次瓣，两者通常存在较大的角度偏移，整体呈 X 形；ZRGs 则表现为双瓣朝相反方向不对称扭折，形似 Z 字。它们的形成机制一直是射电天文学中争论的焦点：主流模型包括流体动力学回流模型（即喷流物质在环境介质中减速后沿宿主星系短轴方向回流形成次瓣）、喷流重定向模型（由星系并合导致中心黑洞自旋轴方向改变，从而产生不同时期的喷流），以及环境相互作用模型（稠密气体或星系际介质使喷流路径弯曲）。由于翼状射电星系相对罕见，大样本统计研究对于甄别这些物理过程至关重要。以 LOFAR 低频阵列为主导的 LoTSS 等新一代射电巡天，凭借高灵敏度与高分辨率，为系统发掘和分析这些特殊天体提供了理想的数据基础。
contribution: 本研究基于 LoTSS DR2 巡天数据，对最新识别的 621 个翼状射电星系（WRGs）开展了多波段后续分析，构建了迄今最大的 X 形（XRGs）和 Z 形（ZRGs）射电星系统计样本。主要发现如下：WRGs 整体呈强射电主导，XRGs 的平均射电光度高于 ZRGs；它们的光学宿主为寄居于中等密度环境中的大质量椭圆星系。对 270 个 XRGs 测量了射电翼与宿主光学主轴的角度偏移，发现大部分呈现大幅错位，支持沿短轴方向的回流机制，但约 25% 的天体偏移角小于 30°，暗示喷流重定向等额外过程同样可能参与。ZRGs 则显示出强烈的反对称形变，表明存在一种协同机制作用于双喷流，并在瓣末端受局部环境调控。中红外诊断揭示，许多 WRGs（尤其是 XRGs）含有与星系并合相关的冷气体，且 XRGs 更常寄宿强活动星系核（AGN），而 ZRGs 多被归类为低激发射电星系（LERGs）。该结果与团队前期结论一致：尽管多数 WRGs 呈 FR II 形态，但 FR I 源几乎仅出现在 ZRGs 中，说明 Z 形结构与较低的喷流功率相关，因而更易受到环境扰动。综合来看，塑造 XRGs 和 ZRGs 的物理机制可能并无本质区别，最终形态应是喷流功率、喷流稳定性与周遭环境相互博弈的产物。
summary: We present a multiwavelength follow-up study of 621 winged radio galaxies (WRGs) recently identified from LoTSS DR2, constituting the largest statistically significant samples of X-shaped (XRGs) and Z-shaped (ZRGs) radio galaxies to date. Our results show that WRGs are predominantly strongly radio-dominated, with XRGs on average more radio-luminous than ZRGs. Their optical hosts are massive elliptical galaxies residing in moderate-density environments. For 270 of XRGs, we measure angular offsets between the radio wings and the optical major axis. While most XRGs show large misalignments consistent with hydrodynamic backflow along the host minor axis, a substantial fraction ($\sim$25\%) exhibits small offsets (<30°), indicating that additional processes, such as jet reorientation, may also play a role. ZRGs, in contrast, are characterized by strongly antisymmetric deformations of their radio lobes pointing toward a coherent mechanism affecting both jets, modulated by local environmental interactions at the lobe termini. Mid-infrared diagnostics indicate merger-related cold gas in many WRGs, particularly XRGs, which also more frequently host powerful AGN, while ZRGs are more often classified as low-excitation radio galaxies (LERGs). This is consistent with our previous results showing that, although most WRGs exhibit FR II morphologies, FR I sources are almost exclusively ZRGs, suggesting that Z-shaped structures are statistically associated with lower jet power and are therefore more susceptible to perturbations. Nevertheless, the physical processes responsible for shaping XRGs and ZRGs need not be fundamentally different. Instead, the final morphology likely reflects the interplay between jet power, jet stability, and the surrounding environment.

title: Clash of the Trident and Tuning Fork: insights from bar and spiral strength in the (massive black hole)-stellar mass diagrams, and the `Triangal' galaxy evolution schema
toc_summary: Bar and spiral strength in galaxy evolution
background_knowledge: 星系形态分类与演化是天体物理的核心课题之一。经典的哈勃序列（Hubble sequence）将星系分为椭圆、透镜和旋涡等类型，后来经 de Vaucouleurs 修订加入了棒（bar）的分类。基于 ATLAS³ᴰ 等大型巡天，早期型星系（椭圆、S0）与晚期型星系（旋涡）的物理起源逐渐清晰。超大质量黑洞（SMBH）与核球质量之间紧密的 M_bh - M_sph 关系揭示了两者的协同演化，但该关系是否适用于盘成分、不同形态特征如何反映演化历史仍是研究前沿。在星系盘中，棒和旋涡结构是长期演化（secular evolution）的重要表现：棒由引力不稳定性产生，可驱动气体内流并触发恒星形成，但其本身可能被摧毁或再生，具有暂现性；旋涡强度则与盘的气体密度和恒星形成率密切相关，可能记录了盘的气体吸积历史。理解棒与旋涡强度如何关联黑洞与星系质量，有助于区分分层并合（hierarchical merging）与长期演化这两类驱动星系生长的基本过程。
contribution:
本文利用包含 137 个星系的样本，提供了定量的棒强度（以棒与总光度比 P 表征）、精细形态分类和尘埃等级，并直接使用黑洞质量（M_bh）及多成分分解得到的核球恒星质量（M_⋆,sph）。将星系置于 M_bh–M_⋆,sph 和 M_bh–M_⋆,gal 参数空间，构建了反映集成增长的演化参考框架。主要发现包括：
- 不同棒强度（含双棒）的星系在图中并无特定位置偏好，表明棒是长期演化的暂现或重现现象，既不追踪等级质量组装，也不标志星系“物种形成”。
- 旋涡强度则可区分出 S0/a 星系的三条物理形成通道：原初 S0 向 S 的转变（primeval S0-to-S）、衰退旋涡（faded spirals）以及最常见的湿主并合富尘 S0（位于“绿色山脉”）。
- 揭示出一条“尘埃消磨/滞留”序列，将具有尘核盘的 S0（和致密大质量 ES,b）星系排列在贫尘与富尘 S0 之间；以及一条“盘缩尺”序列，其中带有尘核盘的椭圆星系（可能经“湿”并合形成）衔接了拥有中等尺度恒星盘的 ES,e 星系与无尘纯椭圆星系。
- 论文深入回顾了形态分类的历史，并讨论了忽视精细形态可能给精密宇宙学带来的系统偏差。
summary: The `Triangal' galaxy evolution schema is used to assess whether the Tuning Fork (bar strength) or the van~den~Bergh Trident and ATLAS$^{3D}$ Comb (spiral strength) offer greater evolutionary insight. A new catalogue of quantitative bar strengths (measured by the bar-to-total luminosity ratio, $P$), refined galaxy morphologies, and dust bin classifications is presented. It contains 137 galaxies with spheroid stellar masses, obtained from multi-component decompositions, and directly measured black hole masses, $M_{\rm bh}$. By placing these galaxies within the $M_{\rm bh}$-($M_{\rm\star,sph}$, $M_{\rm\star,gal}$) parameter space, an evolutionary reference frame reflecting integrated growth is established. Galaxies with varying bar strengths, and double bars, are observed to not occupy preferred locations, highlighting that bars are products of secular evolution-and can be transient or recurrent phenomena-and that they track neither hierarchical mass assembly nor galaxy speciation. In contrast, three physically distinct formation channels for S0/a galaxies are identified: (primeval S0)-to-S transitions; faded spiral galaxies; and, most commonly, wet-major-merger-built dust-rich S0 galaxies (on the `green mountain'). Galaxies with particularly strong spirals appear on the right-hand side of the spiral galaxy distribution. Furthermore, a `Dust Attrition/Retention' sequence places S0 (and compact massive ES,b) galaxies with dusty nuclear discs between the dust-poor and dust-rich S0 galaxies, and a `Disc Down-sizing' sequence is revealed, in which E galaxies with dusty nuclear discs-potentially formed through `damp' mergers-bridge the ES,e (ellicular) galaxies with intermediate-scale stellar discs and the dust-poor pure E galaxies. Extensive historical context is provided, and, finally, suspected biases in precision cosmology stemming from neglected precision galaxy morphology are discussed.

title: Investigating interstellar dust along the line of sight of GX 13+1 using different dust size distributions
toc_summary: X-ray absorption edges probe dust size distribution
background_knowledge: 星际尘埃是银河系星际介质的重要组成部分，主要由硅酸盐、碳质颗粒等构成，对星光的吸收和散射显著影响着天体的观测性质。通过分析尘埃颗粒在 X 射线波段的吸收边（如氧、镁、硅、铁等元素的 K 吸收边），可以反推尘埃的化学组成和颗粒尺寸分布。经典的 MRN（Mathis, Rumpl, Nordsieck 1977）模型用一个简单的幂律分布描述颗粒大小，虽能较好地拟合平均消光曲线，但随着更高分辨率观测数据的出现，其在特定视线方向上的局限性逐渐暴露，暗示需要更为复杂的分布形式（如对数正态分布等）来完整描述星际尘埃的多样物理状态。低质量 X 射线双星 GX 13+1 作为一颗明亮的背景 X 射线源，其视线方向上的尘埃特性为这类研究提供了理想的目标。
contribution: 本文利用钱德拉 X 射线天文台（Chandra）搭载的高能透射光栅光谱仪（HETG）所获得的高分辨率光谱，首次同时对视线方向上的 Si K 和 Mg K 吸收边进行联合建模，系统比较了经典 MRN 分布与其他尘埃颗粒尺寸分布（对应不同星际介质密度）。研究发现，该视线方向上的星际介质既非极端弥散也非极端稠密，更倾向于平均状态的银河系环境。尘埃组分以非晶质橄榄石（amorphous olivine）为主，晶质成分占比仅约 2%。所得的元素丰度及消耗模式与前人基于 X 射线和红外波段的研究结果一致。
summary: Context. High-resolution X-ray spectroscopy offers a powerful tool to investigate the physical and chemical properties of dust grains, especially through the analysis of absorption edges of elements such as oxygen, magnesium, silicon, and iron, which are the main constituents of interstellar dust. In all previous X-ray studies, these absorption edges have been modeled assuming the MRN grain size distribution. This model successfully reproduces the average interstellar extinction curve. However, with the advent of new observations, it shows important limitations, indicating that more complex grain-size distributions are required to fully describe interstellar dust properties. Aims. We aim to constrain the composition and size distribution of interstellar dust along the line of sight to the bright low-mass X-ray binary GX 13+1. Methods. We analyzed high-resolution X-ray spectra obtained with the Chandra HETG instrument (MEG+1 and MEG-3) and simultaneously modeled the Si K and Mg K absorption edges. For the first time, we compared the classical Mathis et al. 1977, ApJ, 217, 425 grain size distribution with other grain size distributions, thus exploring different ISM densities. Results. Our analysis rules out scenarios of both very diffuse and very dense ISM, favoring grain size distributions associated with average Galactic conditions along this line of sight. The dust composition is found to be dominated by amorphous olivine and the crystallinity contribution is about 2%. The depletion patterns and elemental abundances derived are consistent with prior X-ray and infrared studies.

title: Aromatic rings in the Central Molecular Zone: Benzonitrile
toc_summary: Benzonitrile detected in CMZ clouds
background_knowledge: 星际介质（ISM）中已发现数百种分子，其中多环芳烃（PAHs）和含苯环的芳香族分子是宇宙碳的重要载体。苯甲腈（benzonitrile, c-C₆H₅CN）作为氰基取代的芳烃，近年来在金牛座冷分子云 TMC-1 等近邻冷源中被探测，但其化学模型预测丰度与观测存在显著差异，推动了对不同环境的探索。银河系中心分子区（CMZ）是银河系最极端的分子气体聚集区，具有高温（>50 K）、高湍流、强激波和增强的宇宙线电离率等特征。这种恶劣环境为检验芳香族分子的形成机制、化学稳定性及对星际碳预算的贡献提供了独特视角。理解 CMZ 中的芳香族化学有助于揭示从致密分子云到恒星形成区的碳化学演化。
contribution: 本研究利用 Yebes 40m 射电望远镜在 31–50 GHz 频段的超深巡天数据，首次在 CMZ 的两个暖分子云 G+0.693-0.027 和 G+0.633-0.0604 中探测到苯甲腈（c-C₆H₅CN）的发射线。通过局部热动平衡（LTE）和非 LTE 分析，得到柱密度分别为 N = (7.4±0.5)×10¹² 和 (2.60±0.13)×10¹² cm⁻²，对应的丰度（相对于 H₂）为 (6±1)×10⁻¹¹ 和 (4.3±0.9)×10⁻¹¹，与银河系冷云中的值基本一致。值得注意的是，观测到的 HC₇N 与苯甲腈比值（2.15–2.4）显著低于冷源中的比值（4.5–30），表明 CMZ 的环境效应可能相对增强了芳香族化学路径。这些结果证实苯甲腈能够在高温、激波、强宇宙线等恶劣条件下广泛存在并保持丰度稳定，支持芳香族分子作为星际碳重要储库的假说。观测到不同分子尺寸的丰度近乎恒定，与“自上而下”形成图景——即大碳质颗粒（如 PAH 团簇）碎裂生成较小芳香分子的机制——相一致。
summary: In recent years, several aromatic molecules (benzene-based rings) have been detected in the cold molecular cloud TMC-1, with its CN-derivative, benzonitrile (c-C$_6$H$_5$CN), also identified in other nearby cold sources. However, observed abundances differ significantly from chemical model predictions, indicating an incomplete understanding of its chemistry and motivating searches in distinct environments. We report new detections of benzonitrile in two warmer molecular clouds of the Central Molecular Zone (CMZ): G+0.693-0.027 and G+0.633-0.0604. Using Yebes 40m ultra-deep surveys in the 31--50 GHz range, we performed LTE and non-LTE analyses to derive the physical parameters of the emission. We obtain column densities of $N$=(7.4$\pm$0.5)$\times10^{12}$ and (2.60$\pm$0.13)$\times10^{12}$ cm$^{-2}$, corresponding to abundances relative to H$_2$ of (6$\pm$1)$\times10^{-11}$ and (4.3$\pm$0.9)$\times10^{-11}$, consistent with values in cold Galactic clouds. The HC$_7$N/benzonitrile ratio is lower (2.15-2.4) than in colder sources (4.5-30), suggesting environmental effects and a relative enhancement of aromatic chemistry in the CMZ. These results confirm that benzonitrile is widespread and can survive in harsher environments (e.g., high temperatures, shocks, enhanced cosmic-ray ionization) than those in Galactic cold clouds. This suggests that aromatics are stable and abundant species that can significantly contribute to the total budget of interstellar carbon in molecular clouds. A top-down formation scenario, involving fragmentation of larger carbonaceous species, is consistent with the nearly constant abundances observed with molecular size.

title: Mapping the Milky Way with Gaia Bp/Rp spectra-IV: the broken and asymmetric density profile of the stellar disk traced by a large sample of red clumps
toc_summary: Broken density profile of the stellar disc
background_knowledge: 银河系的恒星盘由几何薄盘和厚盘组成，其恒星的径向与垂直数密度分布是研究星系结构和演化的重要观测约束。传统模型常用单一指数律描述盘的径向轮廓，但高精度巡天数据显示盘存在断裂 (break)、翘曲 (warp) 和增厚 (flaring) 等复杂特征。盖亚 (Gaia) 卫星通过提供数亿颗恒星的高精度位置和光谱信息，使得对银河系盘的精细测绘成为可能。红团簇 (red clump) 星是处于中心氦燃烧阶段的小质量恒星，因其光度相对恒定，常被用作标准烛光来追踪恒星盘结构。研究恒星盘的密度分布及其随方位角的变化，有助于揭示银河系的动力学演化、旋臂结构以及棒 (bar) 等非轴对称结构的影响。
contribution: 本研究利用 Gaia Bp/Rp 光谱筛选了约 840 万颗红团簇星，在修正选择效应和距离不确定性后，采用薄盘与厚盘的双成分模型拟合恒星盘的垂直密度轮廓。得到的径向密度分布显示多个断裂特征：(1) 在 R ~ 3 kpc 以内为陡峭的指数下降；(2) 从 R ~ 3 到 ~7 kpc 为近乎平坦的平台；(3) 在太阳半径以外至约 13 kpc 呈指数衰减；(4) 在 R ~ 13 kpc 以外出现更陡的指数截断。这四个区域的参数在一定程度上依赖于方位角 φ。第一个成分终止半径的变化暗示了与棒/核球存在相互作用。除了 R > 6.4 kpc 处典型的盘增厚 (flaring) 外，还发现薄盘在 R < 6.4 kpc 朝向银河中心的方向同样表现出平滑的逐渐增厚特征，这种“内增厚”现象可能反映了银河系棒的加热效应，因为 R = 6.4 kpc 接近棒的共转半径。此外，在 5<R<7 kpc、-30°<φ<15° 区域内识别出一个局域的密度隆起，对应的金属丰度隆起也出现在银道面附近。该密度/金属丰度隆起可能与近期报道的太阳邻域超富金属星导引半径的双峰分布有关，暗示径向迁移过程的影响。
